### alyson thiessen — 2015-06-10T17:57:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-167411>

Good morning Red Deer!!! Great night with CT in the lake. To bed early....and I slept....and slept....woke up and drank my water...made my BAB...jumped on tramp and then WHAM....BAB wouldn't go down...I ate maybe 2 eggs...the ahi tuna wouldn't go down....and I LOVE Ahi Tuna...so I made a smoothie....lots of fat...NO FRUIT...colllagen protein...I had to do something. I wasn't going to go on with my day without it. Now, this I might remind you is EMERGENCY MEASURES...tomorrow I need to find something else to eat and give it another go. My morning ritual is the key to success. Also, I have a nagging headache. Right on my forehead. Behind my eyes. I am not a headache person. I never get them. So, I am watching and listening. Today is a busy day at work. Full of complex problems that everyone needs fixed yesterday.

### caroline — 2015-06-11T03:54:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-167503>

I am beginning to realise that life should be a roller coaster. To be really engaged and feeling all the emotions. That isn't to say that the crap goes away ...it does not ....but so what? That is part and parcel of really living and taking everything in.....

I am a lot older than you ...and I have finally figured this out! A lot of time lost ...but - I am here now and loving and living every second.

Was it easy? I guess not ...it took a lot of baby steps and some incredible people in my life and of course jackkruse.com

### caroline — 2015-06-11T04:05:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-167508>

lots and lots of salmon, GF butter, sardines, coconut oil, bacon fat, a few macadamia nuts

Do you drink Coffee/Tea? what about BPC?
I swear I can eat my body weight in salmon! I seem to go off eggs pretty quickly back then. I can eat slabs of butter!
Try salmon and mashed avocado and MCT oil...

Can you tolerate a little sweet potato in the morning? Nuts? Everyone's journey is a little different.

Don't think of food as a recreation .....

Mackerel is very fatty too and a can is very inexpensive ...load it up with fresh herbs and some onions and MCT oil nd don't forget the tumeric and black pepper!

I posted a recipe in the food section for chicken patties and I substitute fresh salmon bits\[trimmings\] that we get at the fish market.

MHS????

### caroline — 2015-06-11T04:09:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-167510>

one other thing - I find it much easier to eat raw steak - I digest it much easier than cooked steak.

I put some very fatty pieces of steak on a WOODEN board and stick it in the fridge - DO NOT COVER - it becomes a little like salami after a few days. I put some turmeric and black pepper and chill flakes on it - awesome snack.

salmon ceviche? steak tartar?

The other day I sautéed some bacon to render the fat and then sautéed a bunch of chopped cabbage in the bacon fat and loads of butter and salt and pepper and just left it to reduce down and soften.
This has become my new favourite thing. I will add some brussel sprouts next time and kale too.
Caraway seeds added in would be excellent too.

I forgot to say ..... chop the bacon and add it in at the end.

So girls....remember when Jack talked about the iPhone working better when in the freezer than in the hot temps????? Well...I have a story for you....

Today I had a tough day...tons of anxiety. Granted, work is intense right now and I seem to have less time than I want...however, I kept going today...had my BAB....then romaine and sardines for lunch....still felt not right. The plan is for oysters in Calgary tonight but...could I go feeling this bad? So, I came home from work and jumped into a cold bath......AHHHHHHHHHH....I get relief the moment my ass hits the water....everything says, "thank you". So I got out of the bath just prior to shivering...I could feel the shiver coming on and I heard Jack say, If you are obese shivering is not good...so I exited about 15 minutes after getting in.....then I laid on the bed for a bit and thought, "What about Bob?" So....even though I wasn't really 'INTO" it, therapy is therapy....so I gave it a go.

HOLY MOTHER .........Clearly all parts of the anatomy work better in the cold. I was shocked and kind of amused at the intensity of the multiple orgasms. I got the mother load of OXY today. WOOOHOOOO. Guess what??? I feel like a million bucks now. Ready to rock and roll.....

So Cheers to the cold....bring it!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-06-15T05:57:49+0300

What a weekend....yday was all on the couch...and that was ok. Today was AWESOME. Lot's of CT, lots of DHA and some Oxy  Here was the great thing. My legs are visible again. I can see my ankles...I wore a tank and shorts today and people said, "woah..what are you doing??".... How the hell do you answer that question in a little sound byte that they want...they want an easy answer...like "Oh, I'm on Jenny Craig."....they want a pill, a meme....a trajectory to mimic....I know the truth. n=1.

I am spending my spare time preparing food, preparing water, sitting in ice baths....reading, writing, listening. I have questions that get answered just by listening. Also, I do. I don't have to 'get it' to do it. Jack said it worked....so I do it. The more I do, the more the red UFO bulb in my head keeps going off.....this is not a road for the impatient.

I am focusing now on nnEMF. WIFI off at night. I turned my phone off a lot today. Once I get the trimeter I am going to test my whole house and .... also test areas I am thinking of living in. I went to the area I really want to live in today..it is a 5 minute walk to the lake....no towers, no electrical grids....I will test it but it feels good there....I lived there once for 2 weeks and it was awesome....I have put out to the universe to help me transition to a better location. It seems impossible right now but at a core level, I know it's not. I also know that the better I feel, the more money I can make because I will have the energy and brain power needed. I have put the past behind me....for many reasons but I don't want to terminate my bright future...and let's face it my past has been spent in a BAD ENVIRONMENT. I have been uncoupled ALL MY LIFE. So the routines I have put in place will prevail and I am actively going after environment now. Do I realize what this can do to my current reality???? YES. An emphatic YES> I also know that as I become optimal, I can handle whatever upheavals need to occur. No longer living in fear.

DO OR DON'T DO.

THERE IS NO TRY.

Yoda.

Let the force be with you my friends.

If timing is off, distant signals will also be awry. This very same feature is why GPS clocks orbiting the Earth must run faster than clocks on the ground to navigate properly. Atomic clocks are 38 microseconds faster than clocks on the ground. In 38 microseconds, at the speed of light, if this clock difference did not exist, GPS devices on Earth would be off by a factor over ten kilometers a day. When this mis-timing occurs in our brains’ mitochondria, the inaccurate timing results in things like neuro-degeneration, T2D, and autoimmunity. YOUR HEAD AGES FASTER THAN FEET BECAUSE OF THIS EFFECT. Each foot you go higher alters the speed of your SCN making your head AGE FASTER. This is why low melatonin, low vitamin D levels, and high ubiquination rates are all associated with disease generation. The “mis-timing” leads to massive effects at the quantum scale of protons and electrons in CSF, because the scale of action of the SCN is on subatomic particles, not on GPS devices. The differences are smaller, because unlike orbiting clocks, our SCN’s are only 6 feet above our feet, while not rotating 14,000 kilometer’s an hour like atomic clocks orbiting Earth are. But you better believe, Einstein’s relativity is still functioning in that six foot difference even though we can not measure the precise effects well yet. ### alyson thiessen — 2015-06-16T05:00:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-168317>

I have been thinking of some goals. Up until now the goal has always to be 'thinner'....and that remains a goal but I am looking at things through an orange lens now.....so here are my goals:

1\. Weigh 190lbs by Christmas 2016. So as of today, 111 pounds to go. I have 18 months. That is 6lbs/month. I personally think I can do 10lbs/month. That would put me at goal next July. I like where both of those days land....

2\. Get rid of my CPAP machine once I hit 250lbs. Maybe sooner...but it is important that sleep is good so, I will retest myself at 250lbs to see if I need it. That is 51 lbs away. So, Dec 2015. WOW that would be AWESOME. It's super hard to travel light with that thing.

3\. Stay on Leptin Reset as long as it takes. 60-90-120.....days...or more.

4\. CT in the bath/lake/ocean once per day for 15 minutes minimum.

5\. Get back to my love of Downhill skiing this year.

6\. Sign up for ocean kayak tour 2016.

7\. Move to a rural area near the lake by August 2016.

8\. HERE IS THE BIGGY. Move to the Sunshine coast BC OR another very suitable location by July 2018. This means my business is fully portable and not office reliant. As well, this means I have other opportunities I have seized.

I know this is all possible because I tackled a huge to do list on Friday....and I am just plowing through it. I have the energy to this concurrent with running my business and raising my daughter.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-06-17T06:37:13+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-168523>

So....excellent day. Routine remains fairly consistent....As I write this with my orange glasses on I realize that my life has radically altered from where it was a few months ago. I credit Dave Asprey for starting me on this road but it is Jack that has really ignited me...... I never thought I could just give up booze and be fine. Same with Coffee. Never believed it. But my coach made it very clear what needed to happen. I can't do this 80%....all in or all out. So that being said....

Yesterday on FB a thread was started that ended up talking about "people stealing your electrons"...HOLY SHIT! That led me to an interesting discussion with Dexter and Jack chimed in......I concluded in my own mind that there are many people stealing my electrons. BACK THE FUCK OFF AND LEAVE MY ELECTRONS ALONE. This also then confirmed for me why I really prefer being alone right now. I AM CHARGING MY BATTERY...NO FREE ELECTRONS HERE MOFOS. So last night my non operated BF came over and I could feel the energy leeching off my body. WTF. And (kids, cover your eyes/ears) during sex???? OMG this is where the biggest transfer is coming from. Well ..... let me tell you....I think I am better off with battery operated rather than electron sucking....needless to say, it has altered my perspective and also, made me very aware the alone time is my charge up time. Keep charging up baby! So, he left this morning and I didn't make an overtures to when I would see him next....and then my day ensued.

The last few days has all been about 'clean up'. I have procrastinated a lot of stuff. So I made a list and started checking items off last friday. Today I got a lot done...a lot of menial tasks that had to be done...normally, that would've sapped my energy. NOPE! I had energy to spare. My day lasted from 7am-9pm tonight with various activities and I handled them with grace....and I even auditioned for a choir and 'nailed it!"..woohoo. I got in. I haven't attempted that in over 20 years. Why? No energy to carry out the commitment. I have never been a fan of evening commitments b/c I had zero energy. I would flop on the couch after supper and eat sugar or drink booze....viscious cycle.

I literally can feel my battery charging....through my cells, my mitochondria.....through my whole being. It is a new day! I have never been able to overcome the fatigue...all my life I would crash ...CRASH after a day at work. Now I am ready to go.

I am continuing to look at my environment and see how I can clean it up. It is a huge task. But like my list, I will just check one thing off and go to the next. Overwhelm is no longer a word in my vocabulary. Neither are excuses.

All of this energy though is super serene. Grounded would be a good word......

Good night my fellow travellers of the dark candle lit night .... peace

### alyson thiessen — 2015-06-29T07:13:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-169833>

Well.. nothing like an off the grid cottage retreat for me to realize some BIG things....

I am getting better. How do I know? Here is the evidence:
\-higher heat tolerance. I was hot this weekend but it didn't flatten me or discharge my energy.
\-I CRAVE fish. I CRAVE what is good for me. WE had fish sandwiches on Saturday night...I fried up fresh Walleye...and I left the bun..NOT hesitantly but willingly left the bun.
\-I am not burning in the sun anymore. I think this is the BIG One for me. I used to slather on 45spf every 45 minutes in order to spend the day at the lake....and even then I risked heat stroke. NOT ANYMORE. This is wild. My whole life I have burned....now I am fine. I spent three days in the sun and put on 3 coats of spf 30. I was blown away. PLUS not heat exhaustion. WOW.
\-my energy is coming up. Slowly but steady.
\-I was able to climb up the steep hill to the cottage from the beach with no issues. THIS!
\-my morning ritual is steadfast.....wake up...water....breakfast .. CT.

I loved that I could CT, be in the sun and ground all at the same time this weekend. I could feel my body holding on to electrons...FAB!!!

Also, I am perfectly ok letting go of those that are stealing my electrons. I will only say yes to those that don't drain me.

I am also PMSing right now...and it is full moon. Generally that means significant mood swings....and...I am fine   LOVE THIS!!!

I know that BAB is the key to my success ..... it satisfies me in every way. Also, the 7 litres of water daily....I may not rapidly be losing weight but I don't care. I am feeling better....it is happening.

HELLO!!!!!!!!! (Say this like Mrs. Doubtfire would say it! )

Here is the thing....

This marks the moment I stop seeking approval from anyone except me. This marks the moment I stop my 'confessionals' about what I ate wrong or did wrong...FUCK IT....I am accepting full responsibility for my life, my n=1 and all of my choices. Some will be brilliant...hopefully most...some will be moderate...and some will just plain suck...but I see now that I am a battery. Charging my battery for my n=1 includes the following daily:

BAB
BOB
CT

grounding
breathing
meditation
fish/seafood/oysters......!!!!
Water
Water
Water
watching my light cycles
eating at the correct times
excellent thoughts

Keeping the above tight is KEY for me.

My next step is adding some strolling/walking ... not power walking...

I have had the strangest feeling over the past week or so. A calm grounded assurance that all is well. I feel like I am no longer 'chasing' anything or anyone...I am just busy doing whats best for me. This feels amazing. I have no interest in getting another boyfriend...no interest in anyone who is an electron leech....even my libido has evened out a bit.

The big joke this weekend was us yelling as we dove off the dock into the semi cold water "MAMMALIAN DIVE RESPONSE"... I had a pretty captive audience this weekend. Insights were garnered not only by my family, but by myself. Questions were asked...and I had answers. The fact that I know what the SCN is almost gets me off....I feel so empowered.

This is my life. I am so happy to be alone, content and free. Bob is my new BF

Oh where oh where has my libido gone???? Gone but not forgotten....

I started Vit D Cream 7 weeks ago. The biggest thing I noticed was my period right after wasn't as heavy but it lasted 11 days .... Now I am officially 2 weeks late and no...I am NOT pregnant....and my sex drive is almost zero. What the heck? Dating when the drive is zero is like driving a car with no gas....it doesn't go anywhere. Does anyone have any ideas???? I am also curious about the drug "naltrexone"....I am considering taking it after doing some research. I will no longer crave alcohol AND many lose weight on it....thoughts on that? Jack?

My BAB continues to anchor my program. My new routine is now 2 months established and it is good. I could use more cold....I cold bath almost every day for 20-30 minutes. My legs really respond to this.

I am doing nicotine patch and/or gum and that is excellent. It really gets my day going.

I am already thinking of how my routine will need to shift with the light cycles. Thinking about winter....how I am going to do it. I am thinking of getting home from work every day by 3....cooking dinner and being done by 5 ish. I figure I will be in bed by 9pm ... sun doesn't rise until 8am... so... will be very interesting to see how that works. I only have 2 more months of summer....then it's time to think of snow...the good news though? The lake will get cold again

Go out naked....I WISH!!!!!! I have been searching for my own private heaven where I can strip down...I thought I found it this week but alas, no ... That is why I visit NORCAL a lot....I can be naked the entire time....

Here were my thoughts yesterday....I am no longer going to think of this journey in terms of success and failure ONLY FEEDBACK. Yup...feedback. I am trying to tighten that feedback loop so I don't diverge wildly like I seem to do every couple weeks....I am unconscious of my inflammation...yes it is mine, Yes I am taking responsibility....but I am unconscious to when the pin drops...ie: What is happening and why. I think I can inflame myself in a multitude of ways....not just food...I think what happens with me is I inflame....I crave...I eat.....and then this cycle happens over and over...so last night I asked myself, "what do you need to feel good"....I mulled over some choices....and my best choices were: go sit on the grass....go put your orange glasses on.....go take a cold bath...go lie with your feet up......go drink some cold water.........and then relax. So, I did. I felt pretty good last night and great this morning. Slept through 1130-5am....went back to sleep though until 730 lol.

Today I get a lot of lake time after 5pm which will be stellar....Had my BAB....I need more WATER!!!! That is the mantra today.

Today I met with my ex boyfriend first time since the 'incident' on here...and I realized...he wasn't exactly stealing electrons from me....I was letting electrons go.....so.....no, we aren't back together...although, he helped me top up my Oxytocin in the middle of the woods walking barefoot in the moss....OH YA.....

The point is.....why do I let my electrons go? Why do I store protons???? So my DHA is way up...my light and water...way up ... today I got my OXY boost and I also realized....during sex was the purest exchange of energy him and I had...and it was equal...that's why the magic....

Why does it take my legs so long to tan compared to the rest of my body??? And....now that I am getting better at everything..they are tanning....

I noticed today...first time...I ate BAB...didn't really want food until 5pm. WTF?????? YES!!!!!!!!!! I have been waiting for that....

So....tomorrow...BAB...and see if it is a repeat...

Dopamine...seratonin.......so...my dopamine can be low compared to high seratonin....hence why I have done some 'risky' things in life???? I can sense it is becoming more balanced....

I know I have been a bit quiet....but I am letting this all come 'into my body and brain'.....it's like waves of knowledge...and it requires time to integrate. ### alyson thiessen — 2015-08-09T09:16:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-174280>

Wow..has it really been 3 weeks?? I went away on an epic road trip...met up with Quantum Jena from Vancouver....ate 44 oysters while sitting outside in full sun for 3 hours...NO BURN...then we went swimming in the ocean...NOT COLD....woohoo!! I can see the changes happening. My body is a nice golden brown. The bugs didn't bite me as much and actually weren't overly interested in me. My thinking has changed....no slower just far more deliberate. I have been able to be disciplined about an emotional issue that has hounded me for a couple months and that is new behaviour. I am now at a point where I am planning for the fall. Here are the priorities:
1\. Must get a magnetico. I am hoping that it will impact my Sleep apnea for the better.
2\. Must get a landline with a corded phone.
3\. Must get orange screen filters for every device
4\. Must turn off technology by 6pm nightly
5\. Must CT 2-3 times daily
6\. Must eat almost exclusively seafood.
7\. Must avoid people and situations that point me backwards. IE; electron stealers.
8\. Must start some type of HIIT
9\. I am only allowed to have a boyfriend that is optimal. PERIOD. I met someone a month ago and he said a lot of "yes, 'yes, yes"....well, I went to his house tonight....and it's NO NO NO....NO! Too much to turn around there. I am way ahead of him....it's not possible and I don't want to add another person to my train....hard enough doing it on my own.

Starting to think about the relocation. Yup Jack. Vancouver is OUT! WAY OUT. Pacific Northwest is OUT. What if I got a place in the Mayan that I rent for the year and commute. Run my business mainly from there and come back every couple months.

One thing is for sure, I have to keep reading. I admit I am quite lost with everything....but I continue to read and a little more absorbs each time.

I noticed once again that once I 'fell off' the wagon on my vacation I felt markedly worse....when I got home, I was 100% back on seafood....I really hate bread and all the other filler shit....Had a doz oysters today and it hit the reset button for me.

Super stressful week ahead. My daughter has her spinal untethering at childrens hospital on wed...I have NO CLUE what to expect....but I am sure it will all work out.

Thanks for reading!

I can see the changes happening. My body is a nice golden brown. The bugs didn't bite me as much and actually weren't overly interested in me. My thinking has changed....no slower just far more deliberate. I have been able to be disciplined about an emotional issue that has hounded me for a couple months and that is new behaviour. I am now at a point where I am planning for the fall. Here are the priorities:
> 1\. Must get a magnetico. I am hoping that it will impact my Sleep apnea for the better.
> 2\. Must get a landline with a corded phone.
> 3\. Must get orange screen filters for every device
> 4\. Must turn off technology by 6pm nightly
> 5\. Must CT 2-3 times daily
> 6\. Must eat almost exclusively seafood.
> 7\. Must avoid people and situations that point me backwards. IE; electron stealers.
> 8\. Must start some type of HIIT
> 9\. I am only allowed to have a boyfriend that is optimal. PERIOD. I met someone a month ago and he said a lot of "yes, 'yes, yes"....well, I went to his house tonight....and it's NO NO NO....NO! Too much to turn around there. I am way ahead of him....it's not possible and I don't want to add another person to my train....hard enough doing it on my own.
>
> Starting to think about the relocation. Yup Jack. Vancouver is OUT! WAY OUT. Pacific Northwest is OUT. What if I got a place in the Mayan that I rent for the year and commute. Run my business mainly from there and come back every couple months.
>
> One thing is for sure, I have to keep reading. I admit I am quite lost with everything....but I continue to read and a little more absorbs each time.
>
> I noticed once again that once I 'fell off' the wagon on my vacation I felt markedly worse....when I got home, I was 100% back on seafood....I really hate bread and all the other filler shit....Had a doz oysters today and it hit the reset button for me.
>
> Super stressful week ahead. My daughter has her spinal untethering at childrens hospital on wed...I have NO CLUE what to expect....but I am sure it will all work out.
>
> Thanks for reading!

So wonderful to read this! I'm poster child of number 9. Came to same conclusion about what I need just these past few days. No more chasing. Only receiving now. Great to read all this!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-08-11T21:52:49+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-174453>

And....this one:

I No Longer Love You:
How does that feel?

The withdrawal of love.

The creating of a void that is hollow…..or is it ripe with possibility.

I recently broke up with someone I had a long standing relationship with. I guess I was seeing him…I doubt he was seeing me. He had so much promise….

I remember meeting him for the first time…my eyes looked at him like he was the only man in the world. He held me with such care. Although, he often looked at me with more of a blank stare or one of judgement. I ignored this because I knew that one day he would return the look of wonder and love.

As the years went by, our relationship got more distant. He would look at me with disdain and judgement. Controlling my whereabouts, yelling at me and occasionally getting a bit rough. He always said that things were ‘for my own good’….I would cry and slink away and the shame grew…..

When other men were around I became invisible. I became an object and not a person. I was expected to serve and clean and of course, agree with all of his pontifications. I became sickened by my own actions. Capitulating to a man who clearly didn’t love me. I kept trying. I hoped he would turn around and love me.

Finally, he got sick. Stripped of his ego I saw the man he truly was. A shell. A person unable to relinquish control. A cruel and withholding man. He was crippled by his lack of center. No longer all about him, he began to wither.

I finally saw the man my dad was and still is…..

I no longer love you.

It was a Wednesday in the afternoon when I called up terror and it responded, “yesssss”…like a serpent…but it responded because it had sat dormant like a cobra for decades and possibly centuries. It was eager to come out and play as not only had it been ignored but it had been despised and avoided at all costs…NOT TODAY.

“Let’s go terror….”, I said to myself as I slipped into my scalding hot shower.

200 mph

I laid in the tub and shook….knowing I could never understand with my monkey mind what had just happened so I let it integrate and I smiled. The smile of a race well run. The smile that’s full of horsepower……

### alyson thiessen — 2015-08-12T22:19:18+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-174510>

Huge days....quantum leaps....entanglement. Within all of my intensity and joy is a deepness that is almost sadness....gravity perhaps. I had a huge revelation yesterday. I kept blaming my parents and family for being my bad environment...but it never fully resonated with me. I have a hard time with blame because ultimately I feel I am fully responsible for my life. It struck me last night....I am the bad environment. All of my toxic thoughts, behaviours...all of my ego driven bullsit, the lies and not operating from my centre. Of course...I haven't really known what my centre was until yesterday. The revelation was stunning. The unveiling of me. I have been searching my whole life for me...for freedom....and yesterday it came. And with that has come some sadness....

I have betrayed people badly.

Not being able to operate in my center caused me to lie. Caused me to fabricate truths. Sure...maybe half truths but those are still full lies.

Last night I Lied to my ex. I was selfish. In my 'high' of the day I wanted to cap it off with some Oxy....full on reliable excellent oxy. I had really been lying to him for ages in a way. Again, half truths. So, I wrote him an email today and told him. Point blank. No excuses....just the raw honest truth. I know I have lost him and possibly his friendship forever. That I knew going in was the cost. But the cost of not telling him was this....

MORE BAD ENVIRONMENT FOR ME. NO BUENO.

So I am sitting here sad because I love him and I have betrayed him. He's livid and rightfully so.

However....I feel lighter. I feel in a way sanctified. I feel like I operated from my core and I did it for me. So perhaps it was a selfish act. That is ok....I take care of me now. No longer sparing feelings. NO longer capitulating. No longer saying what others want to hear. Living MY LIFE...from my core....it's only truth. I am set free.

I guess if I was telling half truths to others, I was living half truths. Bad environment.

I am not going to be thinned....I am declaring this right now. I am here. I am in. All I do is Win baby.

> Huge days....quantum leaps....entanglement. Within all of my intensity and joy is a deepness that is almost sadness....gravity perhaps. I had a huge revelation yesterday. I kept blaming my parents and family for being my bad environment...but it never fully resonated with me. I have a hard time with blame because ultimately I feel I am fully responsible for my life. It struck me last night....I am the bad environment. All of my toxic thoughts, behaviours...all of my ego driven bullsit, the lies and not operating from my centre. Of course...I haven't really known what my centre was until yesterday. The revelation was stunning. The unveiling of me. I have been searching my whole life for me...for freedom....and yesterday it came. And with that has come some sadness....
>
> I have betrayed people badly.
>
> Not being able to operate in my center caused me to lie. Caused me to fabricate truths. Sure...maybe half truths but those are still full lies.
>
> Last night I Lied to my ex. I was selfish. In my 'high' of the day I wanted to cap it off with some Oxy....full on reliable excellent oxy. I had really been lying to him for ages in a way. Again, half truths. So, I wrote him an email today and told him. Point blank. No excuses....just the raw honest truth. I know I have lost him and possibly his friendship forever. That I knew going in was the cost. But the cost of not telling him was this....
>
> MORE BAD ENVIRONMENT FOR ME. NO BUENO.
>
> So I am sitting here sad because I love him and I have betrayed him. He's livid and rightfully so.
>
> However....I feel lighter. I feel in a way sanctified. I feel like I operated from my core and I did it for me. So perhaps it was a selfish act. That is ok....I take care of me now. No longer sparing feelings. NO longer capitulating. No longer saying what others want to hear. Living MY LIFE...from my core....it's only truth. I am set free.
>
> I guess if I was telling half truths to others, I was living half truths. Bad environment.
>
> I am not going to be thinned....I am declaring this right now. I am here. I am in. All I do is Win baby.

Alyson you are a drink not well mixed yet. You came to jackkruse.com to become "mixed and blended" and have a bit of solid cold added to you. Success without people is a cocktail without ice. [http://www.deandwyer.com/weekly-wisdom-2-how-to-change-how-you-think/](http://www.deandwyer.com/weekly-wisdom-2-how-to-change-how-you-think/)

Thought you'd like this link. I believe @[Jack Kruse](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/1031/) did a video or two with Dean Dwyer when Dean was a Paleo guy. Very cool when "stuff" just shows up when you're aligned with yourself and something or someone confirms your own feelings.

It all starts on the inside.

Jack wants us to think deeply first. We have and we are, Alyson.

Dean came to it as well and has written pretty eloquently about it, and how he continues to feed the desire. First lines are great:
From Dean:
**"A few years back I had an interesting insight.
All the problems in my life had one common denominator.
ME!
No matter what the problem was I was always at the centre of its cause.
And rather than deny this insight I decided to embrace it.
I was the cause of all my problems."
**
This is the stuff that gets me going. Finding ways to communicate change. Finding ways to experience true and real transformation. Very cool shit.

Thinking I needed a man...thinking I needed someone....pretty sure I was waiting for a knight in shining armour....to rescue me? FUCK THAT. I will rescue self. Back to what I know that makes me better....I deleted all the garbage I was following on dating websites...I deleted the distractions...I have to work on myself. (PERIOD). FULL STOP. Filling mind with what turns me on....what lights me truly up...and let's face it. This 100+lbs has to go. I am fooling myself thinking it can't....thinking I can't. It must go. It literally is weighing me down.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-08-27T20:13:34+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-175896>

Ordered magnetico. First night with no phone by the bed...I usually had it there for alarm clock. Bought a battery operated alarm clock that has zero light ---yes, I can't see the time unless I choose to which is never. Almost full blue light protection from 7pm on....optimal food but not a lot yesterday. Only missing CT....had a GREAT sleep. My thinking is really shifting....some of it is a little shocking. Maybe not ready to share it here yet....

I am on a purge right now. I gave away 2/3 of my clothes this week....my closet is pristine and manageable. Throwing away, selling or giving away most likely 1/2 of my stuff tomorrow and Saturday. I just don't see how 'storage' makes me optimal. Fuck...I am storing enough on this goddamn body ...... kinda mad. I believe I can lose 100lbs between now and April. I don't know why I hold this belief. It just seems like it is the time. I know that I will never be optimal with the excess. AND I know it probably needs to be more than 100...I just am having a hard time wrapping my brain around that. Here is what I am terrified of....people saying how good I look....people asking how much I have lost....why does this terrify me????? Because it feels that I was AND AM invalid at this weight currently. I lulled myself to sleep over the last 18 years saying 'it's ok..you are a big girl"....."you look great (for a big girl)". And even as I write this I know the truth. Inflammation is never a sign of optimal. Extra weight is not a sign of being "OK".....I can't tell you how much this pains me to write this. As I write this my throat constricts...my guts are a mess and tears running down my face. I want it so bad....not to look better although, that would be nice to not worry about being judged for my weight....I want to FEEL better...I want to run, jump and play...I want to rent a kayak and not assess the fucking cockpit to see if I fit...I want to travel and not worry that I can't do up the seatbelt....I want to shop anywhere...(although my height will probably still limit this and fuck that if I want to be shorter!!!!) I want to date and not ask "are you ok with a bigger woman".....I want to be seen for just who I am...and I know....the only one running this fucking story is me.

So.... back to the above that I wasn't willing to share.....

I have been thinking of my sex drive. I don't think it is a sex drive at all....I believe it is my fucking ego getting fed to soothe me saying "see, you are ok..look at the men you can get"......without this piece....

Big Fucking Void.....but make no mistake.....I am not drowning in this void....I think I might take a nice long swim in self and focus on what I need to do and stop giving up electrons to feed my fucking ego.

There it is.

Alyson at 2850 is emptying.

### thisbirdhaswings — 2015-08-27T20:34:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-175912>

> [alyson thiessen said:](/goto/post?id=175896)
>
> Inflammation is never a sign of optimal. Extra weight is not a sign of being "OK".....
> Alyson at 2850 is emptying.

I love this and admire you for saying it. I've changed how I think about extra weight since doing this plan. It's a tough balance--being "accepting"/tolerating differences (such as people, myself included, being fat), while also acknowledging that the extra weight is not optimal; =inflammation. The message that (most) fat people (seem to) want to hear is that they're "okay" just the way they are. I say most seem to want to hear the message of "size acceptance" people who convey that message then become popular (lots of likes and shares, etc.). At a certain level, there is fundamental value to every human being and recognizing that has to be separate from also being able to observe honestly what the body is telling us about our current state of optimal. What I want to say is: fat is inflammation, and inflammation is not optimal, and you are (each of us is) fundamentally valuable as we are, fat or not. Make sense?

### nicld — 2015-08-28T16:10:48+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-175979>

That has been my journey for the past 3 years.

I was deep in a cycle of self abuse all in the name of getting skinny. I thought then I would be happy……..lies, lies, lies. I was starving myself and working out all the time. I would get up at 4 am to be out on a trail by 5 to get in a 20 mile bike ride before work and then go for a hike or run after work. I did this for years and never got skinny (imagine that). I did three rounds of HCG and got close to where I wanted to be but it did not stick. I saw someone who helped me see myself as more then my weight and found this site and realized my weight was WAY more than food and exercise. I began to see that people loved me and respected me no matter what size I was. I also turned 40 and became more comfortable in my own skin. Plus is helped that the DH always found me sexy even when I did not.

That being said, I am no longer on the diet and exercise fixes everything bus but still will not accept that I need to be overweight. There is something that is causing the excess weight (hello inflammation) and that I need to get to the root of that. I will NEVER be a size 4 and that is ok. Hell, I got awesome curves but I really don’t want to be a size 14 forever.

You are a very hot/sexy woman no matter what size you are .... we all are!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-08-29T20:21:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176039>

Just read UBI 23....while I understand maybe 10% the 10% I understand is great...

I grew up in privilege....so we had everything 'first'.... I was fed formula because it was cachet....a mark of privilege. My parents liked to be seen as this. Four Children...I was last...the only girl. Each child was something to "show off" according to my dads autobiography/memoir. Sony Trinitron...fax machine...cordless phones....all before everyone else. Campbells chunky soup...microwaved meals...HEATED CAR SEATS....everything first. I moved 8 times by the time I was 17. My dad needed to chase .... probably chase his ego. I was put on a diet at around age 9 or 10 ...low calorie..800 cals to be exact. I lost weight...then gained...I was always active....but my mom insisted on me being on the swim team. Chlorinated pools off gasing into small spaced for hours on end...I HATED IT>.... bad environment. Alberta from ages 3-14....hypoxic. Starving for air. Starving for love. Starving. Smoke allowed in the house....I was encouraged to drink at age 12. My dad thought it was hilarious to get me drunk at a big family party....feed the beast. I was a joke.

I'll spare the ages from 15-20....can't even really blog about that.

I moved from Ottawa in 1991 to Calgary ... finished my degree...landed a job in the cell phone industry in 1993-1994. The cell phone didn't leave my side or my head ... I sold phones...I was one of the first. I would talk on my phone, smoke a cigarette and drive a 5 speed all at the same time. Rock star...fuck.
Then I got married and had babies in 1996-1997. I had two girls 18 months apart and I fell apart....when I got pregnant with my second (Rayna) I weighed 265. I was still breastfeeding Joanna. When I came home from the hospital with Rayna...I weighed 235. Do the math. I crashed so hard that year that it took me 3 years to recover. Dr's had me as bipolar...fuckers. Gained 40 lbs on their meds...I took my health into my own hands in 2001 and gave up all their shit...started vitamins....never looked back. I clawed out of that diagnosis. And phone permanently attached to head...needed to get my career on the way at age 34. Husband out of work...I shored up the ship and flew.... 2001-2008...I worked my ass off although, instead of my ass getting smaller it generally got wider. Chips, pop, cigarettes and coffee... WATER??? Maybe 1/2 c per day. Salad?? Fuck you, I want fries with my fried thinking.

2008\. Moved to Nanoose Bay. Steps from the ocean. NO cell towers...minimal EMF. Vanc. island. Started going to yoga...eating local....sitting outside....I had no idea I was self healing. 2010. Left Husband. Economy tumbled....long haul back. Met a man....my former high school sweetheart...he lived in TO. We were constantly texting and talking...I checked my phone ALL NIGHT to see if he texted. This went on for over 2 years. We would talk for hours....I used a headset. That headset was on my head at least 4 hours/day if not more....that summer I blew out my eardrum in a random way.... lost hearing to right ear for 6 months...eardrum kept blowing out... Moved back to Red Deer...Weighed 265 when I moved back. Over the past 4 years I have put on 40 lbs. Never much below 290. Phone attached and wifi permanent to the house. Blue light all the time...phone, tv, laptop....

All this to say........I have severely limited my blue light over the past few weeks. I have really taken it seriously. My bluetechs go on at 6pm. I have orange screens on laptop and phone. I turned my bluetooth off in my car and on my phone. My phone is OFF at night downstairs. New no light alarm on battery beside bed. Sleep mask...mainly black out room except for window open. I do feel better. My appetite is down. Carb cravings down. I find myself looking for my bed around 10pm...up easily around 7. Anxiety upon waking very reduced. The new place has so little emf. 90% reduction....in everything. Lake is 1 block away. I can walk barefoot there. I'll be the crazy lady at 7 am going for a swim in October and November. Yup...food has a place in all of this but I can clearly see from the above writing that 'being first' has been a bad fucking environment....

### alyson thiessen — 2015-08-31T00:33:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176084>

So...a little bit of news...just put on pants I haven't worn in years....wtf...usually my weight loss/inches loss is predictable and starts up top and works it's way down....but it started in my ASS??? Fuck ya...thanks CT...thanks Vit D...Thanks DHA....bye bye blue light at night..NOT a delight at all....

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-02T17:27:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176261>

Last night I ate way too late even though it was seafood and fish....bluetechs on almost all day....lots of grounding and sun. Weird sleep. Must have been the food. Although, woke up this morning ahead of the alarm. Cold shower....water...grounding and sun...feel great. I was driving to work today with the windows down and it was only 8C....didn't even feel it. Feel like I am integrating again ... really really want back to accessing the webinars but I can't....any help would be great as I need to continue my learning and I spend a lot of time in a car and like to listen....thanks!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-03T17:06:15+0300

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-03T17:21:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176333>

So....started 100% limiting blue light .... what do I mean by that? I decided to wear my bluetechs full time....also taking my morning light seriously and getting up to 30 mins prior to 9am. I have orange screens on everything....Here is what is happening:

1\. my period is lighter. Usually very heavy and dense and ugh.....nope....lighter. easier. No pms. No acne. No bloating. No cravings. Um...this is big.

2\. I am lighter. Everyone keeps asking..."what are you doing"...."have you lost weight?" ... so I am not weighing myself....I refuse as I get into a weird cycle. If I take 3 years to lose 100 I take 3 years...If I take 6 months I take 6 months....weight and food are some of the equation....but not the whole equation. HOWEVER....it feels amazing. I have been able to run up the stairs...first time in years. My legs don't feel so dense and divorced from me....I can feel them and they are working for me.

3\. My thoughts are better. I have quantum on the brain almost all the time. And..it's effortless.

4\. Pretty much zero anxiety.

5\. Sex drive is levelling out...becoming less urgent.

6\. I WAKE UP AT 630.....WHAT??????? This is huge. I am going to bed between 1030 and 11...up on my own at 630!!!! And I feel great.

7\. I only really eat once a day. Around 2pm...large salad with bacon, avo, seafood..... maybe a little snack at 6pm. It's all I want.

8\. I am no longer afraid. I have spent years in fear.....super secret fear....mixed with shame. I feared success and failure all at the same time. Huge contradictions. Now...it just flows....I am just going with the flow...

\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*last night I went to the lake to CT...it was 8pm....sunset. I walked into the lake in complete solitude. Beautiful sand on my feet...and I walked at least 300 meters. I kneeled down on the sand...water up to my chin.....and I rested. I just relaxed into the cold and watched the painted beauty of the sky shifting under my gaze....I easily dropped into a meditative state. It was so beautiful. I heard Jack's words in my head about finding my own music within...my own symphony....and for the first time I heard it....loud and quiet.....insistent and patient.......a roar and a whisper..........thunder and lightening......

Thank you universe for leading me here. Thank you Jack, Ruben, Gretchen, Kate, Jena, Krista and Joe. I will pay it forward.

> 7\. I only really eat once a day. Around 2pm...large salad with bacon, avo, seafood..... maybe a little snack at 6pm. It's all I want.

> 8\. I am no longer afraid. I have spent years in fear.....super secret fear....mixed with shame. I feared success and failure all at the same time. Huge contradictions. Now...it just flows....I am just going with the flow...
>
> \*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*last night I went to the lake to CT...it was 8pm....sunset. I walked into the lake in complete solitude. Beautiful sand on my feet...and I walked at least 300 meters. I kneeled down on the sand...water up to my chin.....and I rested. I just relaxed into the cold and watched the painted beauty of the sky shifting under my gaze....I easily dropped into a meditative state. It was so beautiful. I heard Jack's words in my head about finding my own music within...my own symphony....and for the first time I heard it....loud and quiet.....insistent and patient.......a roar and a whisper..........thunder and lightening......
>
> Thank you universe for leading me here. Thank you Jack, Ruben, Gretchen, Kate, Jena, Krista and Joe. I will pay it forward.

No need to thank and you're so welcome Alyson! YOU are the one working the plan and doing the work! Wonderful to read and see!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-06T07:06:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176596>

So.....my sleep has been WOW....I go to bed at 1030 and wake around 6...but I don't bolt awake...I 'stir'....and then by 645-7...it's just natural to get out of bed....yup...never happened before. And the dreams!!!!!!!!!! WOAH!!!!!!!!

Dream I had a couple nights ago: I was on a cruise ship. The theme was sex and role play. Everyone was half naked or in a costume....kind of like burning man on a cruise ship....There was a gorgeous man who was talking to me but I had to pee...(thank you 5 litres of water!) ... so left...went to the bathroom and came back..he was gone and then the FBI took me aside and wanted to talk to me as if what I was doing was wrong....I escaped FBI lady and tracked down the organizer . Talked to him about the FBI and then it was like everyone was FBI. I then escaped that and went to the market that I thought was onboard (we were docked)....I bought a jalapeño and a water and met Jena fraser....we were talking and then we looked out the window and the ship was sailing...and then the ship did a dophin dive....it was WILD...Jena and i ended up in the water but standing....she then found a tube we could crawl up and end up back on a different ship. I didn't think I could crawl up the tube but I did it with ease. Then we were talking with the concierge to get a shuttle to the ship and there was confusion.....and then I woke up......WOW!

Last night: I was kayaking in a lake...and I looked around me and I saw Mt baker...then I saw Mt Ranier....then mt Hood and Mt shasta...the ring of fire was RIGHT THERE....I was amazed I could see all of them just like a painting...then there was something about me eating sardines.......

Today's CT was HOLY FUCK. OMG SO COLD. When I got out of the lake after 15 mins I was blue. But CT is like the ULTIMATE RESET button for me. ITs like I enter the temple of CT.... I can't even explain it. The ritual of going to the lake is profound.....

Hips down an inch...waist down 4 inches.....put on jeans today that I haven't worn in years........not even going to get on a scale. Don't care.

It's 10pm in Red Deer. 5C....raining. I have made some hard boiled eggs for tomorrow....but food seems almost like a distant memory....
Rayna and I went out today and we were going to get a burger and I said....lets go get sushi instead......I ate the sashimi like a mad woman....I gobbled it all down.......it's like medicine. At flour free seafood chowder after CT.All I ate today. All I really wanted.

I am starting to hear by inner symphony. As I sat in the lake tonight alone with the rain coming down I watched the drops hit the water...making perfect circles in the lake and each creating its own ripple....I thought of the pattern they were creating......it's all the same fucking pattern.........I believe I am tapping into that pattern......adding my voice to the symphony......

I have done something unprecedented in my personal life. Something I doubt any other woman has ever done.....and I am so excited to see the results that I can't wait to write about it........it might be my greatest work yet. And.......with someone I love dearly. Who fucking knew.

Stay tuned for diamond nipple shot............will post on Facebook !!!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-08T06:03:19+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176711>

More dreams....last night dreamed that I was in a vehicle and I flung myself off a LARGE chasm....I was awaiting impact and instead of bracing I told my self to just relax and enjoy the ride...then I awoke..........

The pervasive feeling now is loneliness...now...don't feel bad for me! I am loathing AND enjoying the loneliness. I hate that I am home alone...but I also am choosing that. I can no longer have mundane conversations about sweet fuck all.....I don't want to discuss bullshit....my tolerance is almost zero for trite....

The void in me or the space in me is pervasive. I can't 'fill it'....addiction to food and substance is pretty much gone....

What is happening is the unwillingness to have anything sub optimal.

And this is scary fucking ground for me. Let me tell you. I return to home alone...I leave alone......and yet, I know in my soul that I am creating the void so that I can fill it......

I have so little words to say what is vast in me right now.....so I leave you with the great scape of me.............

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-08T22:33:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176793>

I was always told you can't lose weight if you don't weigh yourself. I can tell you....I am losing weight very fast. I am down almost a size. I have of course Jack and Ruben to thank for excellent guidance (and Gretchen and Kate)....but also @[David Limacher](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/11045/) ... He posted last month about his bio hack with blue light...it hit me like a ton of bricks....I was really negligent with the blue light thinking..."ah....it won't hurt me"...fuck that. It was the missing piece in the puzzle. My blue light exposure is VERY limited and after 6pm its pretty much ZERO. In one month...I have more results than the other months combined..NOW....that being said...I have been doing what I need to do...CT, Sun, DHA, grounding.......the light piece including harvesting AM UV has been the trigger on my loaded gun of optimal. Thank you David for posting your biohack....entangled eh? Magnetico coming...and then new protocol on new house....PHONES OFF and in kitchen for the night. My phone is off now but my daughters is hard to wrangle. She has agreed to putting it in the kitchen with WIFI off.

ALSO: I started about a month ago eating basically once a day. My body rejected BAB and only wanted to eat once. So I now 'feed' anytime between noon and 3pm. I am consistently stuffed when I am done. ZERO carbs. HIGH DHA... So once I move in 10 days I will get to work early (I sun in my office with window open) and then go home for 230, make a meal of fish/seafood/grass fed beef or lamb....and then be done. Food has really lost it's appeal. It's soooo weird. Never been like this. Better Tactics @[Ruben Salinas](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/11868/). I don't waste my discipline on food anymore....

Another shift...I am not afraid of gaining the weight back. That old thinking has left the building. Why? Because I am not on fucking Jenny Craig.....this is my lifestyle forever.

Off to swim in the under 50F lake tonight again. 15 minutes...and I can't feel my hands or feet when I get out.....but wow...I love it !!!! And it's ridiculously hard.

I fed ROE to my business partner today. She didn't hate it...then she had a salad with chicken in it.....ugh. This chicken thing is such a big fat lie.

My sleep continues to be very strange. I feel like I sleep lighter but I am not tired when I wake which is now about 6 ish when I stir.

Love you all deeply...entangled...grateful....the fog is lifting........

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-09T18:21:12+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176858>

My 5 highest priorities...I am keeping these with me. (in no particular order....I would consider all to be equal and they vary in their position all the time)

1\. Family, friends, connection, entanglement....community.
2 Wonder, curiosity, Beauty, learning.
3\. Teaching, inspiring, challenging, coaching, writing
4\. To look at things from a different angle every time. Thinking of those things others fail to think of or notice. Doing those things others won't do.
5\. Me. Communing with me daily...minute by minute...tuning my inner listening to the symphony within

I continually look to see what I am attracting in my life as a measure of where I am at....whatever happens is a direct reflection of what is going on inside of me...the feedback is phenomenal. As I become more certain inside myself and with my thoughts, my outcomes become more certain. I see how people react to me...and when I become uncertain ... that's reflected too...constant real time feedback.

You have to know what you want .... I can't 100% define that yet...it's still murky....I want to live in alignment with the above priorities. I want to live in truth. I want to be optimal ....body mind heart and soul. I want to be of value to my community and the people around me. I want to be a source of strength and reliability. I want to inspire people to become optimal and take their health and their lives seriously. I want to inspire women to take a hold of their lives and stand on their own two feet. I want to inspire them to educate themselves and go after what they want....never relying on anyone else for financial support....b/c there in lies their freedom....I want to challenge myself and others to continue on the harder path...not accepting half truths but piercing through full lies to expose the mediocrity and bullshit within them....

^^^^^^^^^ THIS ^^^^^^^^^^^^ TODAY .......I WILL.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-10T21:39:23+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-176956>

I think the most beautiful flowers and plants get the most attention.

I think the things in life that harvest UV and have the brightest lights get the most attention. I have noticed this.

I've always gotten a lot of attention...now I am getting this organic attention. I am glowing....my filament is starting to glow. The core of me is getting stronger. I am standing my ground....and taking up a lot less 'space'..... yet more space.

When I am implementing light, magnetism and water and doing what I need to do every minute of every day there is a resonance and surety about me. The term that keeps floating through me is PERVASIVE TRUST. Self trust. People trust people who trust themselves.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-11T18:39:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-177004>

All my life...I had a habit that I couldn't break. My mom had the same habit and it became ingrained.....

I would wake up at between 7am and then sit on my ass and drink several coffees and then drag my ass to the office .... always sitting....never moving...sluggish...and hence my lymphatic system and legs became sluggish and now at 47 I am reversing not only this but also my mind sluggishness....

HOWEVER..........

I sold my big lazy chairs in June....and started to sit at a desk in my house rather than on a cushion....I still got trapped by the desk and the computer from 7-9am....and THEN

BOOM

I started harvesting morning UV. I started getting sun....I opened my window at the office, took the screen out (metallic)....and started getting up at 7 am and leaving the house at 730....drinking water .....no sitting....I get to my office at 745 (yes, I live in a small town) and here is my routine:

I go to the local coffee shop below and get a very small coffee (I know...but I am being authentic....it's not banished yet).....I have an awesome chat with some awesome people ... go upstairs and bask in the sun and listen to motivational videos/music....sometimes I weep at this change WHY????

It just fucking happened....the cobwebs are clearing......

I had to attend an event last night....got to bed at 1am....I usually am in bed at 10....and I woke up fresh and alive ....I harvested at least 3 hours of UV yesterday....deep CT for 45 mins....and only raw fish as protein...my day started at 7 and ended at 1am and I was on point the entire time.....
I bounded out of bed at 715 and still kept my routine...."every day you don't get out of bed you could push your dreams off by 6 months...." I could also say..."every day you don't get UV and CT and have DHA.....I could push my dreams off 6 months....." NOT ANYMORE> I have an empire to build....and that empire????

That fucking empire is me.

Ever notice that the most successful people are milling about early in the morning? Ever notice that when you become more optimal you attract more optimal? I had someone say 'no' to me yesterday and rather than see it as a rejection I saw it as this....my optimal pushed him out.....my optimal was too bright for him. I see this as success not failure......and remember: failure is only feedback.

As the foundational pieces are put into my life brick by brick (quilt pieces by quilt pieces).... I am seeing the 'light'.....and I humbly fall on my knees every morning as I gaze at the light and realize that I finally have a foundation. Weeping at the fact that it is all far more beautiful than I could've imagined. Weeping at finally meeting the one person I was missing all my life.......self....she's glorious....

I joined a choir and our first rehearsal was last night. It is a performance choir with excellence. I LOVED IT.....HUGE commitment and now I have the energy to commit....

I am committed to me. Finally and forever.

I am present....my clients are feeling it...I can feel it from them. I am in my own house.

AND....no more PLAYING SMALL.....When I feel the smallness creeping back I fall back on the principles that I know to be true....

light...water...magnestism......

It's fucking amazing when you get that ^^^^ what is magnetized into your life....

Continually stoking the fire of my own flame so my filament is strong, stable and bright.

That happens too......

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-20T01:47:28+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-177401>

What a week. I am somewhat tired...but I can't say exhausted. That fatigue that seems to grip other people doesn't really grip me anymore....I seem to have reserves.

I moved yesterday. I was irritable and cranky....I don't have the money to throw around anymore that I did 7 years ago...that pisses me off...HOWEVER, I thought about Ruben and his advise to me...'gratitude' and...accountability. I chose to move. I chose to better my environment. I chose to go near the lake. So, if it blows through a lot of savings over the next couple months, it just does. Savings won't make me optimal. Savings won't grant me a life of no inflammation.

Let's talk the magnetico for a minute.....I put mine on yesterday. YUP A WORKOUT....but I did it.... first night on it. I could feel myself being sucked in....it was WILD...had a great sleep and I was BOILING HOT. The temp outside was barely above zero (34F).... and I didn't have the heat on. I went to bed around 10pm and got up at 645am...ready to go. I puttered around and found the sun....I ran to the lake at 830am and got in. I am estimating the temp to be 55-60F however, I could be wrong (going to measure tonight on my swim). I CT'd for 20 minutes and walked home wearing my swimsuit. I didn't put on a cover or a towel. The outside temp was approximately +5C. I love the looks I get although, I don't totally see them looking at me because I don't have my glasses on. The CT didn't disappoint...my temple. BUT HERE IS THE THING>>>>>>>>>

2-3 hours later I was in my car and my body got SO HOT...it started on my arms and ran up my face...my face was TOMATO RED (and still is). I wasn't sweating and I don't think it was a hot flash. I didn't get tired and I didn't have a fever. WEIRD.

I am sitting in my new place right now. It's is organized chaos. Can't find my cookware..... I am not dismayed. It will all come together. Come to think of it...where the fuck is my vitamix???

I have more to write..perhaps later. I do appreciate all who read this. Thank you and thank you for your comments and feedback.

I was irritable and cranky....I don't have the money to throw around anymore that I did 7 years ago...that pisses me off...HOWEVER, I thought about Ruben and his advise to me...'gratitude' and...accountability. I chose to move. I chose to better my environment. I chose to go near the lake. So, if it blows through a lot of savings over the next couple months, it just does. Savings won't make me optimal. Savings won't grant me a life of no inflammation.
>
> Let's talk the magnetico for a minute.....I put mine on yesterday. YUP A WORKOUT....but I did it.... first night on it. I could feel myself being sucked in....it was WILD...had a great sleep and I was BOILING HOT. The temp outside was barely above zero (34F).... and I didn't have the heat on. I went to bed around 10pm and got up at 645am...ready to go. I puttered around and found the sun....I ran to the lake at 830am and got in. I am estimating the temp to be 55-60F however, I could be wrong (going to measure tonight on my swim). I CT'd for 20 minutes and walked home wearing my swimsuit. I didn't put on a cover or a towel. The outside temp was approximately +5C. I love the looks I get although, I don't totally see them looking at me because I don't have my glasses on. The CT didn't disappoint...my temple. BUT HERE IS THE THING>>>>>>>>>
>
> 2-3 hours later I was in my car and my body got SO HOT...it started on my arms and ran up my face...my face was TOMATO RED (and still is). I wasn't sweating and I don't think it was a hot flash. I didn't get tired and I didn't have a fever. WEIRD.
>
> I am sitting in my new place right now. It's is organized chaos. Can't find my cookware..... I am not dismayed. It will all come together. Come to think of it...where the fuck is my vitamix???
>
> I have more to write..perhaps later. I do appreciate all who read this. Thank you and thank you for your comments and feedback.

Congratulations on your move--and feeling more energetic than others might in the same circumstances. Not sure what to say about the hot thing. Just keep putting one foot in front to the other. Even when we move to a better environment it takes a toll, so take it slow and go easy on yourself.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-23T17:25:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-177655>

Can I CT too much? I ask because yesterday I CT'd at 8am and again at 3pm...8am was 15 mins and 3 pm was 25...I LOVED IT. I harvested a ton of morning UV and was out in the sun from 3pm-6pm. I ate once + snack at 5 yesterday and it was a feed.....raw ahi tuna, caesar salad with bacon shrimp .... and then I ate three slices of bacon with extra grease at 5pm. LOTS of spring water....I went for a walk along the lake at 7pm...watched the sunset. Came home....talked on the phone in the dark....then...went to bed at 9pm. Woke up at 1am...couldn't get back to sleep.....drifted in and out and I think I finally fell asleep by 4....woke up at 7 feeling belch....My sleep rarely sucks anymore. This was disturbing although, with the magnetico I am much achier....I know this is an adjustment and I went for it and got the 20G....with the shipping and customs etc etc....I just wanted to geterdone  Also...let's talk shivering...I don't shiver in the water and I don't get goosebumps but I can shiver and get goosebumps 3-4 hours after CT...interesting...

I also lost 8 lbs this weekend....and it's staying off....from the CT? Total weightless is 35lbs since March. The biggest loss is in my legs. This is the exciting part. My legs are really big. Generally swollen ankles....thick knees...large thighs..large ass....This is where I notice it the most and why I think I am not noticing it in my waist (where I usually lose it first....) And my boobs are not getting smaller !!!! YES....DIAMONDS BABY.

Mentally I am foggy and sluggish. this part I don't like. I am not bright right now. I am having a hard time concentrating. This being said.....Since Rayna's surgery I have been on a fast track with growth personally and professionally...as well as the move this last weekend which took a bit out of me. I am going to remain gentle with self....possibly magnetico is causing the cleanse.

My daughter got bluetechs...here was her reaction after having them on for 10 mins. "OMG mom...my eyes are relaxed for the first time....".....atta girl. She's wearing them at school. YES. She is a fit girl...but had some serious bloat before our move....we got here....she changed her eating, started wearing bluetechs and of course, we got out of EMF hell....and boom....down 5lbs..........WAIT A MINUTE. !!!!!!!!!!

WE GOT OUT OF EMF HELL......did I drop 8lbs because my environment is better????????????????????????

Jack.......I do listen you know. Now if I could just understand everything? Well...I guess I don't need to know chinese to eat chinese food.....

### Inger — 2015-09-23T18:22:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-177661>

and the morning sun.. and the CT... and the magnetico

If I have stayed off my magnetico for long then the first night on it is not so good, at least that has been my experience.. but after that I love it
I do think it can take a while before you adjust

### Brother John — 2015-09-24T19:28:09+0300

Yes you can. Any person can CT too much. If you CT too much you will lower your core temp and die. And, if a person has weak adrenals they may have great difficulty with even small amounts. I know because it happened to me. When I went from 20 minutes at about 55F to 45 minutes at 50F I just about cashed in my chips.

Brother John

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-25T17:04:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-177857>

Wow...my journal took off without me! Excellent. Let's keep talking CT.

Yesterday I CT'd twice in the lake. The water is below 50F now and plummeting fast. I can honestly say I am addicted to CT.

When I get in the first 15 minutes are nice....but then something happens. I sink into the depths of my being and everything turns off. My mind stops chattering,...the world fades away and it's just me, the water and nature .... it's like I'm stoned without the drugs....expanded...quiet....I love that I get to see a piece of the world that others don't....I love that no one can run into the water with me and talk my ear off....I love that it is mine.

The temple of CT.

As I prepare to go sink into the temple at 802 AM I am in total gratitude for this journey...

### Ian — 2015-09-25T19:33:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-177875>

Brother John gave me something to think about here. Can you do too much CT?

Jack is probably meaning that you can't do too much properly managed CT. (a separate question perhaps) Meanwhile the Titanic demonstrates quite well that there are serious side issues!

Only a few months ago my girlfriend ended up and A&E in hospital with moderate hypothermia. The issue was that it was only her second session this summer - after a long break and she had lost her adaptation. The fast running 10°C (+50 °F) water anaesthetised her skin and she didn't feel the problem develop until too late.

As with most things there isn't any information to show how adaptation proceeds long term and whether it's an ongoing and developing process that could extend over many years - a bit like being in ketosis.

Last winter - though I live at altitude in the Alps - all winter I was able to cycle at 5000ft altitude in racing lycra shorts and shirt - in sub zero temperatures even when snowing (but the road remaining clear). Initial adaptation only took me about a week - some pretty agonising cold baths - but after that my bike rides of up to 2 hours were trouble free - only bare fingers being an issue from time to time. I loved the stinging "needles" feeling on my bare arms - the same as with a very cold bath. All winter I had only one very short cold at Christmas - transmitted from ski clients on holiday. Christiane (of A&E fame) had been 14 years on thyroid drugs and just a few months of a ketogenic diet and cold adaptation and she was able to get rid of that medication totally - and has never felt better. I can't say there has been any weight or fat change due to the CT because neither of us are overweight. What is interesting is how the body boils at night when sleeping after a cold bath earlier on - even with the bedroom door to the exterior wide open and -15°C (+5 °F) outside.

One thing I found from ferreting out research papers is that they discovered the hormone that produces brown fat only in 2012 and that both cold and exercise produce this hormone. This is another reason why sport and health share the same context (an argument which is going on in another thread!). Perhaps by cycling in the cold - almost naked - I'm getting a maximum brown fat development.

I managed to get up to 45 minutes fully submerged in a 3.5°C (38.3°F) bath - without shivering (until afterwards). The bath does warm though during that period. Christiane was probably caught out a few months ago by underestimating the cooling effect of fast flowing water.

I'm sure that meditating is the best way to deal with the cold - but for me total distraction works best. I put my tablet in a ziploc plastic bag and work on emails and other rubbish - which makes the time fly.

The more serious issues that need to be raised however involve "Hydrocution"! Most of the people from the Titanic would have been dead within a few minutes of entering the cold water. I've done several offshore survival courses for working in the North Sea and they make this danger very clear. The survival students practice in a heated pool - jumping from a height and getting out a an upside down helicopter in the water. For everything else the standard drill is "survival suit". You don't get cold in the water in a survival suit - I've tried it in the North Sea. However you don't wear a survival suit when working - even when on a ship that is hitting gigantic waves and is airborne half the time. Nobody ever mentions "Cold Adaptation". Hydrocution is when the cold water causes sudden cardiac arrest. The same really as electrocution - but due to cold water. What happens is that it causes "vagus inhibition" - the vagus nerve simply switches off the heart. This nerve passes just beneath the jaw beside the cartoid artery and even a small impact on that spot can have the same effect and kill somebody stone dead. This is why even falling momentarily into a cold stream can kill someone on the spot. It's known that if you survive the first few minutes of falling into a cold ocean you can survive for a long time - even without a survival suit. I don't know if Cold Adaptation actually protects us from sudden Vagus Inhibition but I suspect that it might well do. Another good reason for always being cold adapted.

Hypothermia is always possible - as both Brother John and Christiane have found out - but in both cases it looks like there was a sudden step up in exposure length and perhaps not enough appropriate adaptation. The question then arises whether someone can actually cold adapt to the point were hypothermia is no longer an issue. There must be a limit however or the Inuit would not only sleep naked they would run around everywhere naked. I think that by defining "properly managed CT" then perhaps we have a sensible framework.

Christiane in the water...

> As with most things there isn't any information to show how adaptation proceeds long term and whether it's an ongoing and developing process that could extend over many years - a bit like being in ketosis.
>
> Last winter - though I live at altitude in the Alps - all winter I was able to cycle at 5000ft altitude in racing lycra shorts and shirt - in sub zero temperatures even when snowing (but the road remaining clear). Initial adaptation only took me about a week - some pretty agonising cold baths - but after that my bike rides of up to 2 hours were trouble free - only bare fingers being an issue from time to time. I loved the stinging "needles" feeling on my bare arms - the same as with a very cold bath. All winter I had only one very short cold at Christmas - transmitted from ski clients on holiday. Christiane (of A&E fame) had been 14 years on thyroid drugs and just a few months of a ketogenic diet and cold adaptation and she was able to get rid of that medication totally - and has never felt better. I can't say there has been any weight or fat change due to the CT because neither of us are overweight. What is interesting is how the body boils at night when sleeping after a cold bath earlier on - even with the bedroom door to the exterior wide open and -15°C (+5 °F) outside.
>
> One thing I found from ferreting out research papers is that they discovered the hormone that produces brown fat only in 2012 and that both cold and exercise produce this hormone. This is another reason why sport and health share the same context (an argument which is going on in another thread!). Perhaps by cycling in the cold - almost naked - I'm getting a maximum brown fat development.
>
> I managed to get up to 45 minutes fully submerged in a 3.5°C (38.3°F) bath - without shivering (until afterwards). The bath does warm though during that period. Christiane was probably caught out a few months ago by underestimating the cooling effect of fast flowing water.
>
> I'm sure that meditating is the best way to deal with the cold - but for me total distraction works best. I put my tablet in a ziploc plastic bag and work on emails and other rubbish - which makes the time fly.
>
> The more serious issues that need to be raised however involve "Hydrocution"! Most of the people from the Titanic would have been dead within a few minutes of entering the cold water. I've done several offshore survival courses for working in the North Sea and they make this danger very clear. The survival students practice in a heated pool - jumping from a height and getting out a an upside down helicopter in the water. For everything else the standard drill is "survival suit". You don't get cold in the water in a survival suit - I've tried it in the North Sea. However you don't wear a survival suit when working - even when on a ship that is hitting gigantic waves and is airborne half the time. Nobody ever mentions "Cold Adaptation". Hydrocution is when the cold water causes sudden cardiac arrest. The same really as electrocution - but due to cold water. What happens is that it causes "vagus inhibition" - the vagus nerve simply switches off the heart. This nerve passes just beneath the jaw beside the cartoid artery and even a small impact on that spot can have the same effect and kill somebody stone dead. This is why even falling momentarily into a cold stream can kill someone on the spot. It's known that if you survive the first few minutes of falling into a cold ocean you can survive for a long time - even without a survival suit. I don't know if Cold Adaptation actually protects us from sudden Vagus Inhibition but I suspect that it might well do. Another good reason for always being cold adapted.
>
> Hypothermia is always possible - as both Brother John and Christiane have found out - but in both cases it looks like there was a sudden step up in exposure length and perhaps not enough appropriate adaptation. The question then arises whether someone can actually cold adapt to the point were hypothermia is no longer an issue. There must be a limit however or the Inuit would not only sleep naked they would run around everywhere naked. I think that by defining "properly managed CT" then perhaps we have a sensible framework.
>
> Christiane in the water...
>
>
>
>
> An hour later...

I wonder where she was in her cycle....my body behaves very differently in the cold depending on hormone levels....which after having a thyroid issue may still be stabilizing for your friend? Mine test well, but we all know numbers in a lab only mean so much. We have to mind the power of the cold as we do the light...mother natures tools are far more advanced and powerful than mans. I hope she is doing well
