### Ian — 2015-09-27T01:20:30+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-177950>

One thing I forgot to mention... Not far from where I live there is a public pond used for family bathing. Water is taken from the Isère river - so it is cold. The pond is emptied for winter and filled again in May. A few years ago, shortly after the pool was filled a ski instructor who I'd known for several years and was about the same age - dived into the water on a nice day - and died on the spot. Heart failure. This was no doubt the "hydrocution" I mentioned earlier.

What I'm trying to say is that this is a very serious subject. For instance - when standing naked in still air at 0°C it won't be too uncomfortable. Just a small amount of wind though and the chill factor will be life threatening. At 20 mph the "wind chill factor" creates an effect equivalent of -14 °C. Water vastly amplifies heat loss issues - so it's frightening to think of the comparative "current chill" that would exist. The trouble is that there is no data on this subject. Despite being a qualified hydrographer and having worked in the oceans around the world I've never come across any data on this subject (though I may have missed it). Wind Chill is common knowledge in the mountains - but nobody seems to think that people will be in cold water. What I'm getting at is there is no data and therefore no protocol - not just here but anywhere. Is this relevant? Yes it is. I have friends who are triathletes who train in cold water. I have one less ski instructor friend. Christiane recently visited hospital as you saw. Brother John sounds like he almost died. We are not idiots - so there is something slightly out of place here.

You lie in a cold bath and over a 40 minute period that bath will warm up several degrees. Last year I used that (along with estimated volume) to work out how many calories I'd expended by heating up the water. It turned out that my caloric expenditure was higher than when running!!!! (wonder why you lose weight?)

You go into a still lake - well you aren't going to change the temperature of the lake by much - so the chilling effect on your body will be greater as the heat dissipates away from your proximity.

You swim - you will lose heat fast - much faster than remaining still - even though you are working to create heat.

You go into a fast moving stream - standing still - the heat loss lowering your core temperature will be shockingly rapid.

The problem is that the physiological signs can easily become confusing in unfamiliar situations - no shivering - no notable signs until too late due to the accelerated processes. We also don't know if Cold Adaptation can prevent hydrocution - which caused that poor unsuspecting instructor to die (despite him working outdoors in the snow all winter). My gold medalist (UK nationals) triathlete friend went swimming one time last winter without a wetsuit and after only 7 minutes had serious trouble getting out of the water - despite believing that she was well adapted.

It seems like suggesting people to "CT" is a bit like herding cats. Protocol is fine in a highly controlled environment - but as we see here hardly anybody in reality stays indoors in a bath tub. We all have different circumstances and will experiment and adapt to our circumstances. Perhaps we shouldn't?

### alyson thiessen — 2015-09-27T17:24:55+0300

Very interesting comments...thank you all! CT is very very interesting and agreed that protocol needs to be followed and of course, the most important protocol is listening to self. Here is an example:

The days that I DEEP CT i.e.: 1 swim in morning of 15-20 mins and 1 swim in afternoon of 35-40 mins with head submerged I can feel a huge 'loss' from my body. Although I feel clarity I also feel depleted. The days I only do one swim in the morning I seem to have more energy. The days I do one swim in the afternoon I have no appetite and I get colder. I have noticed myself 'checking' myself lately and when I feel too cold after and can't warm and start to shiver I will have a shower or a bath. This happened last night. I had a swim at sunset ...gorgeous. Came home and sat by the fire....I felt good but later on right before bed I got a chill. I had a nice quick warm bath. That helped a lot...then I ROASTED all night...we are down to zero here in Alberta overnight which is 32F. I have yet to put the furnace on.

As well, during the week I intermittent fast....sometimes going as long as 24 hours...of course though the one meal a day I do eat....I EAT. It seems to work for me ---- or does it. I will weight myself today and then we will see if it is working for me.

Context is everything. CT taken out of context is like herding cats. CT in context is a very efficient way to convert white fat to brown fat....not to mention all the other benefits....PLUS being seen as a bad ass every day as I swim is awesome. In my context because I am overweight and 70% of my weight is below my waist I can tell you that moving that weight off my ass and legs has always been an issue. I know that CT is moving that weight. This is where the biggest change is...below waist. I have friends that like to dabble in the quantum lifestyle...you know ... a swim here....some oysters there....maybe some fresh water once in a while....that is herding cats indeed. You can't dabble in this .... its a forward progression where principals are added brick by brick to form a foundation of optimal. I am building that foundation now....it feels like I only have one brick in place but....You can't connect the dots looking forward......in other words....Since April when I weight 325 I have come a long way. And it's not just the weight. It's how I think and feel.

Today to be very honest....I feel shitty. Big full moon today......apparently the tides are huge...of course. It's a super moon. I am going to take this opportunity to recognize that the tide is out right now for me.......and let my emotions meander in the tide pools that are left. I am not taking anything I feel seriously. I will not let my emotions control me.

And...I am tired. Really fucking tired.

Ok....I'll let it stand at that....if I really put on here some stuff...well let's just say then we have page 9 all over again.......

Stephen Hawking goes on about the Big Bang and Black Holes - so people just accept it and are probably even afraid to question. If you are not accepted as "brilliant and expert" then you shouldn't presume to be so impertinent as to doubt the high priests - or so people think. ("Big Bang" theory came from a catholic priest named Lemaitre.) Anyway the actual name "Big Bang" came from the Astronomer Royal, Sir Fred Hoyle. He named it - but insisted that the theory was wrong. He died in 2003 while still maintaining the same opinion. He's not alone. The actual science behind this is fascinating. When jargon and science seem to bamboozle - it's pretty sure to be wrong - not you!

### Ian — 2015-09-28T18:25:11+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178025>

Looking at post number 5 here - from Jack

> Einstein’s relativity is still functioning in that six foot difference even though we can not measure the precise effects well yet. I know it exists because the laws of physics says I am correct.

My specialist subject is precise navigation - at sea. Obviously today this means GPS - but not when I started out - that technology was pretty crude. All I'll say is that GPS does not use Einstein Relativity - it uses Lorentzian Transformations and time is considered Universal in a 3 dimensional universe - not 4 dimensional Spacetime as Einstein would have it. Einstein can be used for basic navigation but for certain complex purposes it fails. What's interesting here is that it's physical and testable. The companies providing the algorithms for the devices need to avoid Einstein. GPS satellites have programmed clock compensations hard wired before launch.

However - even though Jack's statement at the top here is now slightly wobbly - it would make no difference to the subject he is referring to. Lorentzian time dilation is true. The problem is that such sweeping statements makes me wonder were else there might be a hiccup. For example in the excellent book Epi-Paleo Rx Jack cites Sherpas as being a supreme example of health and boundless energy - yet nobody lives at higher altitude than they do. Unless I'm mistaken - there is a significant contradiction here. I'm comfortable with the logic used in the book - it made good sense - but not with this subsequent reliance on "science".

### Ian — 2015-09-28T18:42:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178026>

So far I'm happy to report that CT has not given me an urge to ovulate or have babies. The idea of trying to heat up a lake by swimming in it makes a lot of sense for weight loss - and the CT effects that follow are amazing. I measure the effect by using a small cheap alcohol tester. The Chinese sell them on the internet for about 4$ - silicon chip based - and they can't tell the difference between alcohol and acetone. Being on a ketogenic diet (permanently) this means there is a spike visible in ketone production and so acetone in the breath. A ketogenic diet on its own doesn't give high levels of ketosis but when accompanied by aerobic exercise and/or CT then it jumps up. Both exercise and CT clearly mobilise fat metabolism and so also ketone production. If you aren't in ketosis - which also normalises fat levels - then this wouldn't work.

Using one of those meters is another good reason for dumping alcohol. I stopped alcohol 100% about 10 years ago and just point blank avoid it. Most of my peers are semi alcoholic. Of course if you consume alcohol then you can't use the device to monitor ketone levels.

### Ian — 2015-09-28T20:24:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178036>

Here's how it works out for a satellite moving at 3870 m/s:
**Altitude**: If we use General Relativity (Gravity) then a difference of 1060m altitude gives a clock difference of **10 ns** (nano seconds) per day.
**Latitude**: The difference in speed between the pole and equator is 465 m/s - which using Special Relativity gives a clock difference of **900 ns** per day.

What this is telling us is that latitude has around 90 times greater effect on clock differential compared to altitude. So if this was really affecting my health then I should be 90 times more concerned about my current latitude. But does that mean we should all migrate to the poles or the equator? Should we only ever travel in one direction to mitigate the damage?

I suspect the answer is here: [http://www.alternativephysics.org/book/GPSmythology.htm](http://www.alternativephysics.org/book/GPSmythology.htm) and is summarised in the conclusion of this neat little article. "Synchronising".

> **Conclusion**
> The presence of Special and General Relativity effects has no bearing on the accuracy of GPS operation. In summary, it wouldn’t matter whether clocks aboard GPS satellites ran faster or slower than Earth’s clocks or even changed their speed each day. Just so long as the satellites’ clocks remained synchronised with each other and the time-difference relative Earth’s clocks didn’t become too large, GPS receivers would continue to calculate their correct position.
>
> The GPS is certainly an excellent navigational aid. But from an operational viewpoint at least, it doesn’t serve as a test for Relativity. Scientists should stop calling it that.

### Ian — 2015-09-29T14:52:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178115>

That's still ok. 45 to 50 is good - but below that it's hard to stay long in running water. If you have a lake it should at least stay constant and only drop slowly in temperature. We get fluctuations between 32 and 55 depending on whether the sun is shining.

Carbs are fine! It's just putting them in your mouth that isn't. It's simple. There's only one hole (your mouth) to avoid. Don't put any carbs in there.

There's millions of products out there - marketers galore - all sorts of rubbish. But it boils down to one mouth and what goes in it. I find it easier than my girlfriend but carbs are only addictive when you eat them beyond your particular threshold. Appetites are healthy and always return - but if you can avoid carbs entering your mouth for a while they soon stop hijacking your hunger appetite.

Perhaps it's the quantum cake effect? (quantum just means "discrete steps" - 1, 2, 3 etc)

Instead of "Schrodinger's Cat" experiment we have Schrodinger's Cake - where the cake exists in both states simultaneously - eaten and not eaten. It's only when you open the cake box that the quantum wavefunction collapses so that we know the fate of the cake. This probably explains why, mysteriously, you suddenly find the cake box empty and the cake inside your stomach. Perhaps there is a use for quantum effects after all.

> On the subject of carbs and putting or not putting them in one's mouth...
>
> I had been struggling with some of that since the move here. Now, granted, there is more sun, etc, (and My experience is that I can get away with having more carbs here than in other environments),but still I found myself excusing my behavior in part because of the difficulty I found of feeding the kids in this new environment (regional/cultural differences, new school environment, living on the beach where the idea of a refreshing snack is ice cream). I would get all of us an ice cream or a hamburger with a bun or whatever.
>
> So, I had a revelation that it was up to me--I am a self determining individual. Time for me to put the oxygen mask on myself first. Stop worrying (so much) about what the kids put or don't put in their mouths. Certain things can be in the house to feed them without going in my mouth.
>
> Now, I have not been "perfectly Epi-Paleo" since this revelation. Gulfgirl can attest to this as we were at an art fair and I shared a lemonade made with real sugar with the kids. She was so sweet offering me stevia for the lemonade so I could stay on plan. The last thing I wanted was stevia sweetened lemonade! So I owned my decision to make a different choice.
>
> Not sure what is different here in terms of some decisions like that not derailing me. But at this point, I can have some of something like that on occasion without the floodgates opening completely.
>
> One thing I wonder: do you think your body is telling you not to IF? IF is for when our redox is much improved. I'm still eating 3 times a day. Every once in a while I might eat twice, but it's rare. Some of this is habit, or sharing mealtimes with kids, but also I don't think my body is well enough to thrive and do IF. I did a bitof IF pre-Jack and know it's possible to not be hungry for food. But when I'd IF, the needle would not budge. That was a clue I wasn't ready, though I may not have realized it.
>
> Anyway...one step at a time. One day at a time.

Thanks for this!!!

YES....IF is NOT working right now....that is for sure. I am going to up to twice/day

AS for the scale...I don't care. I will lose this weight...I just don't care if it is 6 months or 2 years.

I am just so tired....lack of zip....

### Ian — 2015-09-30T02:13:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178204>

> When ATP generation is low, you will crave carbs to offset this loss

Not necessarily! I've raced up to 8 hrs on a road bike (in the mountains) without eating anything - and energy levels only improved by the end - because I refused to eat carbs ! However if you are not properly keto adapted then that won't happen at all - you will collapse. I see guys collapsing, in a big race. Literally hundreds in hospital - sometimes several thousand dropping out. You see them wobbling into a feeding station on their last legs for their carb fix when without eating anything you go straight on past. The problem is caused by carbs. Carbs shut down your fat metabolism then rapidly run out - making you crave more - causing an ATP shortage. You can't play this half way. Dump the carbs and the hormones sure and certain sort themselves out. The cravings never return. "Sweet" becomes repulsive. Carbs are the problem. It's not some other problem leading to carbs!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-05T17:53:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178645>

Today is the day full of approval for all that I am and all that I have been......today I am remembering the lessons I have learned ....how quickly they can slip away. How quickly it can slip away.......

I don't fear 'falling off the wagon'....I'm not on a wagon...and I'm on a full speed ahead train and sometimes I just take a break while on the train but this break is never without consequence and never without a full knowing of who I am and what I am doing.

I did forget about self love and self nurturing. Even though I am excellent at meeting my own needs I can forget to do it .... I also can see satisfying certain needs as paramount and supplanting other needs...which in the end are actually higher on the level for need. So today is the day I am relying on my foundation and ensuring that I am taken care of.

So....today rather than looking around .... I am looking within. I am seeking my symphony.....and bringing her to the forefront. I will never find my symphony looking into the reflection of another. I can only bring my symphony forward and let it shine. Here is where I need help.

I have been so used to being 100% independent...fiercely independent that my 'others' sense has been skewed. I don't know if it lack of empathy or lack of boundaries (hate that word)....but my role in community is (for lack of a better term) strange to me. My closest friends tell me what my role is and confirm my strengths but ... nothing feels overly authentic. I feel most authentic alone. Vulnerability can grip me and then I just run...... I know what this is about. I am a runner. I bolt at the first sign of friction. I hate conflict. I hate being called out......and here it is and I fucking HATE that I am writing this.......I feel like everyone lets me down. And yet, the evidence points to this being not true. I think the truth is this: I let me down. I let myself down when I forget the principals and begin to try to stave off my self hate with food, sex and booze. Granted this 'staving' has changed dramatically in the past 6 months...but reared it's ugly head on Saturday. The self hate is pervasive and subtle....for example I can't not pick insect bites on my body....I pick until I bleed and the cycle keeps going...and Im covered in scabs. I can't not pick. I used to bite my nails to the quick. I am anxiously anxious. The only thing that takes the anxiety away is three things...and again, can't believe I am going to list them but fuck it....I am not on here to be "correct" and "polite".... 1. Sex (during the act of sex all anxiety is quelled ....BUT the moment it's over I am gripped again within a minute or two) 2. CT. The cold turns off the hate. That's why I love it. 3. Psylocybin. i.e.: magic mushrooms. I don't use mushrooms often....a few times a year and micro dosed but it turns down the anxiety....but like Ruben once said, "slippery slope". I do love though the few hours of bliss I experience on them. I do know life would be better if the anxiety/self hate were to silence. The GREAT news is the self hate for my body has really toned down....but yes, my self hate is like a fire breathing dragon and when she decides to up and 'roar' there is great disturbance within and my heart and soul gets singed with her fire.....how do I turn that fire into a furnace???????? How do I get it to fuel me rather than burn me. Maybe that fire is white adipose tissue and inflammation......and why has this fire turned up since I moved?????

Since I have moved I have a way better environment.....CT out my door. Magnetico (20G) .... my spring water consumption far better. Great oxy. Food has been 70% perfect. Morning UV. And......even though my environment is better and am far more anxious here. I have no routine which I desperately need. I need NEED to change my lighting...it's driving me bananas.....blue pot lights EVERYWHERE and although I don't have them on at night I still hate them. (( I will do this by tomorrow...change pot lights to orange and red). This house is really 'loud'....I am so sensitive to sound in here....hardwood everywhere...high ceilings......no buffers anywhere. And....to add insult to injury I just don't have a few grand to throw at the problem and this really really pisses me off more than anything. Without the cash I want in the bank I feel inert. And I am super tired about worrying about it.

And now all I want to do is apologize to my readers for this brutal post. As vulnerability grips me as I re read this I want to just go hide but I won't. I need to just leave this here as I know my inner symphony is paused due to anxiety. motherfucker. To make matters worse the stuff I have been writing about privately is so against the well worn groove of society that I can't even post anything publicly...so I feel like I am hiding.....totally sucks. And I can't post it here as this is a public forum and although I know a few people who read this...I also happen to know of people who read my blog who aren't involved with this forum.

Happy Monday everyone.......let's see what unfolds this week...I will keep you posted.

### Jack Kruse — 2015-10-05T18:20:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178647>

Woman is not what she thinks she is, she is what she hides and I see no shame in your game. That is a good sign. Freedom is on the other side of discomfort. Embrace the discomfort to get to the promise land. Too few every even attempt it because of fear. Fear keeps you in your dirty cage. Posting as you do can emancipate yourself from the mental slavery of a low dopamine level. Get in the purple light and keep at it because you chronic actions of light water and magnetism has the key to that dirty cage.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-05T18:20:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178649>

Hmmmmmm yes.... this might have prompted my anxiety..... I went to a party on saturday night. The room was filled with people who know of what 'environment' I was living with called 'family'. My ex sister in law was there. She was married to my torturer. She knows. She gets it. The tortured tortured. We talked a lot about him......I had some drinks.......then my boyfriend came and met me. He was not happy with me. It compounded my anxiety ... he didn't stay. I had no ground at the moment to reach out in my pain. I had no ground to ground. Just memories of things that will never ever be acknowledged by those who let their fire breathing dragons burn me. Fuckers. ..... and then this.

My friend in Edmonton posted.....eery and painful and the worst kind of tragedy.....His girlfriend was murdered in a murder/suicide by an ex. It hit me like a thunderbolt to the chest. I had just had a talk with him the week prior. He IS a champion.....he is an amazing man. He had let this woman into his heart. He was rebuilding. She had reported to the police her fear....it did nothing. And now she is dead. Mother of 5....D E A D..........JESUS FUCKING CHRIST!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

When will men stop. The torture, abuse, power bullshit stop??????????? Ok...I am going to cut an paste a blog post I wrote 18 months ago...a tribute to my family.......I am mennonite.... you can do that math on the title.....

**Misogynite**

I woke up this morning to the smell of mens cologne. Mixed with coffee this is like a tonic to me. Why would this be a tonic to a 12 year old girl? Because this is the smell of my dad. Sometimes there is the mix of eggs in there as well; my mom dutifully performing her role every morning. I wonder why she goes back to bed when he leaves? She seems tired.

My brothers all tumble out of bed and ramble through the house in the morning like awkward beasts. They seem to forget to put clothes on when the walk past me. I just don’t understand why they smile at me when they parade themselves like this. And not sure why they don’t look at my eyes. What are they looking at?

I really despise getting ready for school lately. The bra I have to wear is super uncomfortable and makes all my clothes look funny. I feel awkward and on display. My mother tells me to just ignore the stares and to carry on; “boys will be boys” I am told. In my house I am invisible except for my boobs. They seem to have a life of their own.

My mom told me about sex the other day. She said things like, “keep you legs closed”….”good girls don’t” and when you get married you will “grin and bear it”…I come from a mennonite family. And Jesus saves…All so confusing. What do I do with the feelings bubbling up inside me? How do I express this ?

Then I listen to my brothers talking. Masturbation. Girls are sluts. “Piece of tail”….

I want to ask questions but there is no point. Every dinner and every lunch I am told to be quiet. I am talked over and interrupted constantly. It is like I have no voice. Why is it the boys and my dad have so much fun while my mother and I have to cook, clean and be enslaved? I just want to belong to the club…the club of man. Mennonite…Mankind…..or manrude.

My dad came home from work today mad. He told me how fat I was looking. He refused to hug me…He was literally disgusted with me. I ran up to my room and cried. My mom came in and just told me to “get ready for dinner”, where I could be properly silenced in front of everyone.

I have often thought of running away. I thought family was supposed to make you feel welcome and unafraid. Instead, my days and nights are filled with terror. I am verbally shut down and even accosted… I am emotionally berated and physically…I dodge my brothers physical attempts to control me as he violently grabs my boob and squeezes so hard I have to hide the bruises.

I bug my brothers. They literally think I am a nothing. They treat me like a slave. In an attempt to salvage some form of esteem I will talk back to them. I don’t just take it like my mom does as she slinks back to her room, locks the door and muffles her screams. I talked back to my brother last week. He got in my face and I told him to go fuck himself. He’s an adult now…so he used adult means to silence me…..

\*\*\*\*WHAM\*\*\*\*

A fist flew through my head. I spiralled around and hit the floor. My hand went up to my face and could feel the swelling underneath my cold hand. I got up and ran to my mothers room where the door was locked so no one could interrupt her self pity. She opened the door and took one look and asked, “what did you do to deserve this. You clearly brought this on”.

My bruises have subsided now. I guess the lesson is to never stand up for yourself as a woman. To let them run roughshod over your body and soul. The lesson is to just take what they give without question and then to go to my room, lock the door and dream of a day when men are beautiful loving conscious human beings who care for their women and children like precious human beings rather than people to be shut down.

Hmmmm I only shut down those things I fear.

I wonder…..

### Ian — 2015-10-05T19:48:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178659>

You actually sound pretty normal and healthy! When I feel really shitty I just go out for a run. Twenty minutes into a run and even the worst anxiety and emotion vanishes totally. I might actually still be 100% in the shit up to my neck - but all those negative reactions disappear. Some people mistakenly believe that sports causes you to become dependent on endorphins - and that over time you need to work ever harder to get your "fix". In reality it's the very opposite. The fitter you become the easier it is to zap the stress. It NEVER fails. It only requires aerobic work - nothing intense or brutal. My girlfriend is similar to you and she has repeatedly tried to resolve her issues through kick boxing! Inevitably she just comes home even more beaten up. It was a courageous effort to confront her demons but perhaps not the best way. She also feels the enormous shedding of stress and tension from running - but works (as I do) also on her perception. The thing about running (or other sport) is not just the "running" - it's about being mindful and focusing internally. Being conscious of many details and fully in the present. That can be described as "centring". The more centred you are the less those external influences (including relationships) can affect you.

\*hugs\*

love,

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-05T21:48:46+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178667>

> [Ian said:](/goto/post?id=178659)
>
> You actually sound pretty normal and healthy! When I feel really shitty I just go out for a run. Twenty minutes into a run and even the worst anxiety and emotion vanishes totally. I might actually still be 100% in the shit up to my neck - but all those negative reactions disappear. Some people mistakenly believe that sports causes you to become dependent on endorphins - and that over time you need to work ever harder to get your "fix". In reality it's the very opposite. The fitter you become the easier it is to zap the stress. It NEVER fails. It only requires aerobic work - nothing intense or brutal. My girlfriend is similar to you and she has repeatedly tried to resolve her issues through kick boxing! Inevitably she just comes home even more beaten up. It was a courageous effort to confront her demons but perhaps not the best way. She also feels the enormous shedding of stress and tension from running - but works (as I do) also on her perception. The thing about running (or other sport) is not just the "running" - it's about being mindful and focusing internally. Being conscious of many details and fully in the present. That can be described as "centring". The more centred you are the less those external influences (including relationships) can affect you.

LOL Normal and healthy...I'll take that Ian! Never been said about me before... I quickly abandon my centre and now that I have studied the dopamine link I see I abandon self to get a dopamine hit......who knew?

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-09T17:13:01+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178927>

Good morning....I am about to go and CT and harvest UV....but first....an update.

I went to Calgary for a course Wednesday and Thursday. My partner drove and her car almost drove me into the ground...I could feel myself getting more tired and inflamed. I proceeded to seek seafood.....fish...anything.......I downed a can of sardines.......ah......a little more grounding. Then we got to the hotel where the course was......the room was a dark room, no sunlight....all artificial light.....stale air....I sat through one presentation and announced "I need some sun"....went outside, took off sandals and stood on a small piece of grass and got some sun. What a relief. I seemed to be better after that. First night without my magnetico....that's no fucking fun!

Next day....same thing....terrible room....so on the break I went out, took of my shirt and wore my tank and walked around harvesting morning UV....I was better again. Then the drive back in the Lexus.....OMG...it kills me! I am seriously on the look out for an older vehicle...I am almost 100% sure my vehicle is killing me too...I think that is the first thing Jack ever said to me..hahah, we are the first group to be vehicle downgraders.....love it.

Ok.......off to swim.......it's thanksgiving in Canada this weekend........I am thankful for:

light water magnetism.......this group, Jack......my new quantum tribe. my kids.....the few friends that love me as is......my inner symphony.....Ruben.....the lake.....the sun........me. love love love!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-09T19:55:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-178940>

Big clue.....need more oxy...less chasing dopamine....MORE chasing morning UV.....It's sinking in.

[http://theunboundedspirit.com/full-spectrum-bliss-the-secret-to-an-oxytocin-based-sexual-connection/](http://theunboundedspirit.com/full-spectrum-bliss-the-secret-to-an-oxytocin-based-sexual-connection/)

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-10T22:28:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-179015>

Hours of morning uv yesterday and today....and I set up my time with my lover for a loving exchange....what a difference! I basked in the oxy after with no crash! I was able to fall asleep on him...no angst, no anxiety. Woke up feeling pretty good. Chased the sun and now am going to go for a long CT. I feel very balanced and happy. I must up my water. 2-3 days of NOT ENOUGH....today I will drink 12 oz every half hour. It's thanksgiving here and it's glorious out. 22C ... the water is still very cold so CT will be extra awesome today. I need a plan for morning UV when it gets dark here...so I think I will get up at 645 and leave the house around 715. Work until 9am and then go have an hour in the sun. I need to find a place where I can make that happen and I have a few clues. It will all be about the temperature. -40C is unforgiving but if I have to sit in my car with the windows open so be it.. and of course, I tan. I found a salon I like and what I found is that the 'super high efficiency bells and whistles' bed put me back a bit...so I now use the lesser bed and feel so much better.

Today I understand the oxy connection...thanks! the light has been turned on.....literally and metaphorically.

### endless — 2015-10-11T02:38:46+0300

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-11T23:15:39+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-179131>

Chased oxy this morning...woke up down....had a rough sleep. Up at 4am and couldn't sleep. I don't have the heat on in the house and I was BOILING despite temps of about 15C in my room. Is this my light starting to increase? I don't need covers or anything when I sleep anymore. Once I was up after 8 I just headed to the city to get the rest of my groceries for thanksgiving tomorrow......and then this happened....

I was driving out of Sylvan Lake and I was feeling quite depleted. I reminded myself..."Alyson, it's just chemical...you're ok"....and I thought about how feelings of wellbeing are not 'the norm' for me ....and as I was driving I searched for some music on the radio and I stopped on CBC and there was an amazing choral piece called "hallelujah" by Eric Whitacre....as the inspiring voices filled my vehicle I could literally feel the good feeling chemicals filling my body...well being pervaded every cell and I gave total thanks to the universe for serving up what I needed in that moment. I rode that chemical wave (and still am) all day.....after I did groceries I went for a walk with my friend Laura. Into the 'secret' forest as she calls it....stunning. The decay everywhere....leaves dancing in the wind....the smell musty .....we hiked to a green space, took off our shoes and laid in the green grass. The temp was 10C and very windy and I was wearing jeans and a tank top. I welled up with gratitude. Then.....we took off to hike up the hill. Now...here's the thing. Due to my size, hiking up hills has always been uber no bueno ......it's so hard on me and then I get into my sympathetic nervous system and being to panic and......but not today. I slowly made my way up the 150 stairs and .... I was ok. I rocked it. I was so proud ...minimally out of breath. Legs felt fine. To top off the great day....my lover texted if he could come over and cuddle...."YES"!...

Happy Thanksgiving all my friends. Here is the Eric Whitacre piece....so beautiful.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-13T16:29:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-179356>

A beautiful thanksgiving weekend in Sylvan Lake. My oldest daughter was down from the island, Marty hung out most of the weekend...we had a nice fireside Saturday and then I made the big traditional dinner. ......

I have been chasing Oxytocin. This is a bit of a different approach for me as I love dopamine. I love the thrill of dopamine...the chase... the intensity...but damn I don't love the crashes. So in the past few days I have been chasing oxy. Hugging more.....laughing more....more eye gazing. More cuddling. And those things that I chase for dopamine, I am more easily giving them up. However, I sure can feel dopamine tugging at me from time to time....wanting me to "HUNT" an experience. I totally see the difference.....now here is what Oxy did for me yesterday morning.

I woke up at 7 am (fairly normal time for me). I drank my water, perused Facebook and awaited the glorious sun. At about 750 the sun began to emerge and I could feel my body respond. I grabbed a blanket and sat outside (it was -1C). The sun on my face was beautiful. After about 30 minutes I went inside and put on choral music. I was steeped in the choral tradition from birth and it is 'comfort' music to me. A beautiful piece began to play and I looked around at my new place near the lake......and I felt this overwhelming JOY. Not ecstatic....no...the type of joy and gratitude that almost puts you on your knees. I thought of the three people upstairs still sleeping and how the three people I love most were under my roof all at the same time. I cried tears of knowing and thanksgiving......letting the chemicals flow through me .... and I harvested that....let me tell you......

I then made coffee for all three and brought it to them in bed. The smells of a thanksgiving were flowing throughout the house. It all felt right. Then the song "this little light of mine" came on. It a version by YOYO Ma....it's actually gospel (isn) and I began to sing.....holy cow the solid energy and happiness was phenomenal...I danced around the kitchen...just as my daughter rounded the corner....her comment, "mom, you're cute" and "I got that on video...smile..you're on instagram!" How lovely.

Like I said on an earlier post, I don't have a ton of guideposts for feeling like all is ok in the universe and I can certainly see that dopamine with its highs and lows is not something I should chase......but chasing oxy.......

As for the traditional dinner. Yes, I ate the FOWL....and felt FOUL.....so 20 minutes after eating I asked, "hey, wanna come watch me swim?" Second swim of the day in the lake at 50 (I took temp that night and it was 50 after a sunny day..the morning was more like 45). So Marty, and my friends Carl and Lenore came and watched me. As I dove in I could hear someone yell..."she must be in menopause"...I told them to fuck off.....and I swam like a champ. Stayed in just over 15 minutes ... head under.This really served to 'reset' me from the food. And yes....BOILED ALL NIGHT. This is not menopause boiling..its like a slow hot pot staying HOT. I am hot all the time.....and I welcome this.

Interesting .... talking about 'reset'.... This is how I told a friend that food wasn't the ONLY thing to adjust....it's the easiest and the 'sacred cow' for most....but here is how I put it to her.......

Food can't save you from not getting morning UV and CT.....

BUT CT and morning UV can save you from some sub optimal food......

ah ha moment for both of us.....

It's a short week..I have an empire to build........

### thomas — 2015-10-13T21:09:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-179395>

I don't think one variable is more important than another. To me, It's a whole the more you get right the better. ### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-13T21:19:53+0300

No. In fact...I am mainly KETO (which is an oxymoron I know as mainly KETO is NOT KETO)....but I can tell you....had I missed morning UV and the swims even if I would've eaten KETO yesterday I probably would've felt like crap this morning.....

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-16T17:48:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-179661>

This really hit me today...square between the eyes. People....stand up and like this post if you have ever had self hate towards your body.

I think that this is the single biggest thing stopping people from becoming optimal today...especially women. I weigh 288 and I have no self hate. I fully approve of my body today as it is.

I refuse to live in "tomorrow" or "yesterday". All I am is now. Think about it. ALL I AM IS NOW. I can't hear my inner symphony if it is drowned out by the voices in my head that call me names. The voices that want to destroy me. I silence those voices every day .... it's discipline but I do it. I fully approve of myself....
RIGHT THE FUCK NOW.

I believe that self hate for your body (or any other aspect of self) is A BAD ENVIRONMENT. And we all know what a bad environment does for your body.

It's not all about weight and food.

Light...in your eyes...on your body...warming your skin.....in your heart and soul......

Magnetism......in your being......in your mind......in your life....

Water....hydrating your being....letting it wash over and stir in you the greatness that is hiding....letting it cool the heat of the day....

Full approval for self. At all times.
Let it be your mantra. I know it's mine.

### Hansen Kenimer — 2015-10-16T21:41:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-179685>

Oh, absolutely!

And I also know that physical changes (via the addition or subtraction of stressors, be it emotional and/or environmental) are the driver for emotional changes. Emotions cannot change for the better until there is a corresponding physical improvement. We feel what we are at any given point in time. Which is not to say we are what we feel.

I suddenly feel the need to call them "quantum changes," not physical changes...through the loss or gain of electrons. Quantum changes leading, of course, to physical, emotional, and spiritual changes. Which makes me think that the only limit on what we can become is determined by our ability to capture and store electrons/photons. So the number and health of our mitochondria becomes paramount. Seasonal Winter = mitochondrial biogenesis. Seasonal Summer = mitochondrial health (given proper ROS signaling.)

OK, shutting up now. Sorry, my brain is on overdrive. I know I'm preaching to the choir here!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-19T17:29:47+0300

Ah self hate you bitch...or maybe you're an asshole...either way, coming to visit me yesterday for a bit and then interrupting my sleep at 3am, being relentless with my heart, soul, mind and body. I fucking hate you.

It all started with a slow slide of self harm....picking a couple scabs....biting my nails....having a cigarette....what the fuck...this is all behaviour from a different decade...this isn't me anymore......but motherfucker you just keep torturing. And then the descent into hell called carbs. Why can't I climb out of this hole? I resolve every day for a change....I do everything right and.....boom. I fall on my face. I am so hungry all the time right now. I can eat my body weight in fish and fat and still want to eat more........(ok, that was a bit dramatic).

I have to keep it real on here....or else I become a bobble head...a yes woman....a person unwilling to dig. Excavation has begun and today.... I am just so fucking tired.

### cantweight — 2015-10-19T18:08:55+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-179872>

So this is something i am just figuring out....Im about 20 days into this hack. Protein was fucking up my efforts every time I pushed ketosis....every fucking time. I was exhausted, pissing ammonia...irritable as fuck. Keeping carbs super low...prob 10-15 daily, eating protein but not pushing it like I was before, and a shit ton of fat. Its working, no cravings. Admittedly too much dairy but what fucking ever its where my fat is coming from right now and when my insulin issues are no longer Ill go back to more epi-paleo. Protein raises insulin period. People like to defend it but in a fat lady like myself any insulin raising is bad insulin raising. My energy is good....long fucking battle to get that back after trashing it with forced ketosis. My skin is clearing after about a years battle with that bitch. all of my old versions of ketosis ended with me falling on my face....generally into a pizza....a fucking organic locally sourced pizza...lol and inevitably alcohol. I havent had a drink in almost a month and Im not looking to rip anyones head off....this is huge for me...huge. I have sucked at this for so long. My answer just wasnt the same as everyone elses. Still hate being fat, its gross and doesnt suit me...but I am dropping a lb a day now so Im a bit more optimistic about my skinny jeans and boots

Much love...

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-19T19:37:42+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-179880>

AH HA!!!!!!! BIG thanks to both Christi and Jena this morning for helping me drill down on my issue above......it's one word.

ENVIRONMENT.

This all started 2 weeks ago....when the internet guy replaced my modem........I looked at it suspiciously and thought....whatever...how much harm can it do????????

PLENTY.

I have to keep that modem in order to control wifi in my unit and the one below....if we get separate units I will be screwed as they will install a big 5G one in her unit....so...here is what I must do. I have her schedule. She is a nurse and works nights a lot....I will watch her schedule and turn it off as much as possible.

I have been cooking myself and my body just couldn't cope along with shorter light cycles.

No straight lines........but I am super grateful I got it figured out. Phew! Oh...did I mention I have PMS too??? First time I have had PMS in awhile....

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-25T02:38:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-180381>

SELF HARM 101.

I really need to write about this to integrate it and understand. Not sure how long this will be but I don't think it will be fun to write. Here goes:

I love to self harm. How do I do it? Junk food, booze, picking, nail biting and.....BAD romantic relationships primarily with narcissists. Awesome.

I went back to the guy who I left in June. You know...'electron stealer"....I honestly thought If I just CT'd enough and did the right things I could keep my electrons. That is laughable. No amount of great sex makes up for a bad environment. RIGHT????? So I broke it off today. Enough is enough. Here is the takeaway:

I don't have a fucking clue what love is. What I was given at home was about them. Both parents narcissists. My brothers...narcissists...perhaps I am too??? I don't know. What I do know is I have no clue how to receive love and probably very little clue on how to give it. The narcissist WAS perfect for me because I could just give and give and he would latch on and have endless of blonde adoring supply. What a fucking idiot I am....what is wrong with me.

I got back together with him early Sept. I love how he cheated on his then girlfriend with me...lied to her about it several times....kept cheating on her...kept lying...then lied to his ex girlfriend in Ontario and on and on.........I think he was parading his deceit in front of me to see if I would figure it out. I did. He would lie like this to me too if he hadn't already. I continued to let him further into my life...and then that is when I started really struggling with being optimal. I had just moved (which he didn't help me on iota) and was exhausted....I kept CTing...great food...good UV.....but sliding .... started feeling worse and worse. Then...a little bulb in my head went off (full of fucking violet light)....."he's stealing your electrons"........ I shut that voice off. Fuck you!!! I will CT more...so I did...and I tried and got more tired and more frustrated.......the little voice got louder....."he's not helping you he's hurting you"....I still ignored it. SELF HARM 101.

I wanted the hot stud to love me. I wanted everyone to see that I had landed the hot young stud with the gorgeous body......not to mention.......(yup...you get it).... I was mesmerized by him in bed. THIS WAS AN ACT!!!!!!! It's like a card trick .... he has 'skills' in bed....so what.....I want connection. I want real. Fuck the hot cock and body....I want to roll over in the morning and be ecstatic he's with me. Not have a knot in my stomach because he's there....oversleeping....laughing at my quest for science and optimal....

I can no longer hurt myself by saying yes to self harm through terrible men. I can no longer run after these users who will suck me dry. I can no longer go to the dry well seeking hydration.....

My dad and brothers are the dry well. I am a big fat zero to them. Literally and figuratively. They only taught me how to get harmed. Never protected. Never loved. Never nourished. Starving and thirsty all the time. They, like the ex bf can't love me. I can love me. And that starts now.

I have blocked him on my phone and on email. I am no longer entertaining anything from him. If he sends me flowers ---- they will go in the garbage. I threw out the gifts he gave me. I will never ever ever seek him out nor entertain his company.

This is nothing personal against him. It's just that he can never give me anything but take my electrons and then leave me for dead and move on to another victim or 5.....

As I write this I feel so sick. He may read this as he has lurked here before.....and that scares me. He ex girlfriend has read this before as well....

Ok...I am going to throw up now.

### thisbirdhaswings — 2015-10-25T15:20:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-180416>

Alyson, look at how far you've come. I can see it when I look at your FB pictures. I see more than someone who has shed weight, I see someone who is gaining greater clarity and groundedness. Life is not static. Your future need not look anything like your past or present. I liked JanSz's idea of the purple ink from the standpoint of using color to imprint consciousness, but on the other hand, what do we really want to imprint and re-imprint in our consciousness? Only you can answer that question for yourself, if it's even relevant inquiry for you. What I've learned here is what I think about, feel and perceive changes without much effort (exercises, modalities, etc.) as the dopamine rises. I love the image in Osho's Zen Tarot deck of cards for trust. Here's the image (with a commentary that may or may not resonate): [http://mysticmix.com/osho-zen-tarot-card-week-trust/](http://mysticmix.com/osho-zen-tarot-card-week-trust/). I love that the adventure is in the leap, not knowing what awaits...but trusting without the rational mind interjecting that it is yummy, pink, and you will be cradled by life itself for having jumped.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-25T16:31:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-180419>

How awesome to wake up to these posts my friends...and the first thing I saw this morning was Jack's post on Harm....nailed it.

I love how the wound is turned around into the strength....

My sense of adventure by the way Jack is high....really high and I am really looking forward to the next few weeks prior to the cruise I am going on so I can regroup and continue. I know what to do. I know how to do it.

Last night I went to bed at 10pm. No booze yesterday. I might try that again today and go to bed around 830. I really like how I feel this morning.

and I want to also point out that you guys really loved me on these posts....and that is raising my oxy as we speak. I feel it. Thank you.

Huge gratitude to all of you.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-25T21:53:35+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-180443>

Back on Page 18 I posted a blog post I wrote a couple years ago....there is a follow up blog post...I am posting not to keep reiterating my pain...but because I want to be witnessed and....now I also want to be done. I have no idea how to put the dragon away but I need to slay that motherfucker now. I can't wait another year....another month...another week. IT MUST BE NOW....Today I CT'd in really cold lake water. I broke the ice with my feet...and when I bowed down in the water I made it my baptism....I stared at the sun and asked the universe to show me what to do. I think letting go of this is like getting into really cold water....JUST DO IT. so here is the post. And cheers to me today. NO more looking back. It's done.

[**MYSOGENITE 2…THE ‘GO FUCK YOURSELF’ EDITION**](http://freemypussy365.wordpress.com/2014/04/13/mysogenite-2the-go-fuck-yourself-edition/)

I went home this summer for a visit with my family. Two years of university under my belt and I hate it. I don’t get it! Granted, I party a lot…but somehow I am getting by.

I am not sure why I come home though? My homecoming is all about my parents. They have such a tight lock on me that they don’t even want me going out. They want to monopolize me. “we paid for your ticket … you have to stay home”. I feel completely trapped. I can’t wait to leave. I lie to my parents and tell them I am meeting a nice mennonite boy named Dan for a date. Meanwhile, Dan and I go to the bar and get totally shit faced. I wish I wanted to fuck Dan…that would come in SO Handy right now.

I love to fuck but recently it got me into trouble. I ended up raped by two men I knew. YUCK> I am trying to get over it but I feel my victimhood bubble up …. I cry at odd times and feel slightly dirty. I go through it in my mind…was it consensual? Did I ask for it? What was I wearing/?? Oh right, i was wearing a tampon. The Dr who examined me the following day said the tampon would pass in a few days.

I passed out Saturday night at home and was awoken at 9am Sunday morning to the blaring of hymns. GET UP!!!! It’s Christian time!!!! Let’s get our Jesus christ on……fuck. My dad badgers me until I get up. Something like, “you get all your sunday’s to your self at school…come to church so we can show you off”. SHOW ME OFF????

I amble downstairs in a short skirt and shirt…my mother says, “YOU CAN”T WEAR THAT”….”you don’t have the legs to pull that off….go change”. I look at her with surprise and indignance. I go upstairs and change into black pants and a blouse…the uniform of the godly body haters. “better” she says.

Driving to church I watch the world go by and wonder, “why am I doing this??” “why don’t I just refuse?” … oh…right….refusal is tantamount to overt rebellion and will be punished…a slap across the face or….

“I AM GOING TO FUCKING KILL YOU”>>>>>> MY brother hated my outright rebellion. He hated my breasts, my legs, my hair and my attitude. He was going to suppress me as best as he could….weekly he would grab me by the throat and push me up against the wall and declare his hatred…. I had given up telling my folks because “boys will be boys” and “stop antagonizing him”….

JESUS FUCKING CHRIST AM I EVER FUCKING MAD.

So, I am choosing to do what I can. I am loading up on carbs and booze in an attempt to create a soft landing in my body as I have no soft landing anywhere else….I am softening my mind with booze so that I can attempt to let some light filter into my soul as I writhe in the type of pain no one can see or understand. The pain of total rejection. The pain of complete unacceptance. The pain of having a family that doesn’t care. The pain of a family that wants to completely silence me in every single way.

I AM SO FUCKING MAD.

I can barely breathe. My throat is locked. My mind is numb. I need to escape.

I need to break free of this existence. I need to break free from their chains.

I want to die just to silence this pain.

GO FUCK YOURSELF FAMILY.

DRAGON….IT’S OVER….SURRENDER.

### Jack Kruse — 2015-10-26T14:18:46+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-180476>

I thought about what you wrote last night as I slept. Do you awaken just from a type of sleep? Modern life has managed to numb our senses while we are conscious. Maybe your family early family was helpful in training you to be submissive to control the animal within? The more you contain an animal they more ferocity they use to escape. The more risks they take. But the risks are often taken at the wrong time for the wrong reasons. Don't let risks taken at the wrong time harness your adventurous exploration. Where's your sense of adventure, right now Alyson? It is buried in your passion here...........where you write about you. Might it have died in a way under mysterious circumstances you shared? I think so. A kind of light spread out from us when we rejoin life; And everything seems to changed color in some small way. I sense this is where your headed now. Your struggling because youre a buxom blonde that evolved in blue lit world, and the purple/red youre beginning to see with your blue adapted eyes is confusing to your perception as you awaken. Youre beginning to see your true colors. Inside, the blue made you ugly but you are beginning to sense your pretty solid in a purple red world. You have to protect that vision now.

The world is beginning to open inside out and the fog on your eye lifts so you can see the new world order unfolding in front of you now. We already contain everything we need, Alyson. You need no drugs, no supplements, no cryotherapy. There is no need for self-improvement. These trips we lay on our psyche are like clouds that temporarily block the sun. But all the time our warmth and brilliance remain around us hidden from perception. This is who we really are. We are one blink of an eye away from being fully awake.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-10-27T19:31:41+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-180575>

Thank you all.....seriously.

All I wanted to do today was wake up and write in this blog that "yay...it's all good, I feel great......boom"....and that is SO not the case. Spent the night circling the drain....no sleep...demons dancing in my head. And I had plenty of thoughts....Most of them unproductive...but here was the one that kind of haunted me:

"what is Jack saying......??????? He keeps saying I am not who I think I am......"..........

and I am not.

Is this the pain I continually feel??? Is the construct I fabricated called my own environment body/mind/soul just a coping mechanism....is my 'kick ass attitude" a total lie? is this just my ferocity to be free....but when in fact maybe I am sensitive and delicate and lovely. Maybe I am nice and gentle....what if this isn't me? Am I like the pit bull that is trained to be fierce?

And if this isn't me? Who the heck am I? And all I can think of is a time when life was innocent and ok......I don't have that time but I want to think I was an innocent beautiful girl that wanted a voice. And because Ihad no voice my own voice had to get louder.

This is the question......who am I in the red/purple glow of the truth. I feel broken but I am hanging on to truth. I am hanging on to principals. And I might feel broken. But I am not.

If I wasn't a 'geterdonegirl" and I wasn't kick ass.....who would I be?

Here is the vision that has always been in my mind. FOREVER. I have always wanted to live far from the maddening crowd...and be self sustaining. And live a simple life. I have always wanted to lie in the sun and help people near and far....what do I want to help them with? Seeing their self worth. Funny. My tattoo on my back is "inspire".....the tattoo on my wrist is Freedom and Love. I really want to write and I want to coach. This is what I've always wanted...when I went to University I went for journalism and slipped into Economics...b/c it was easy for me and family approved....but I dream of the esoteric ...I dream of witches and potions and how things work and then, how they don't. I dream of the moon and the tides and why darkness is given such a bad wrap. I dream not of greatness....I dream of gentle wakings....loving hugs....I dream of helping those that can't help themselves.....yes....I lost my dream in it's finality when I was 19. I felt called to go to Nicaragua and volunteer....I felt compelled....MUST....my dad said, "not this year Alyson...."........dream died forever....and I let it die. I take ownership of that. But truly...my push is to get south. My push is to figure this out......and here is the thing.....I can't be patient with it. I must pursue....my life truly depends on it....if I didn't have kids last night might have ended up badly......but I must figure this out so I can help them. I can understand them. I can be there for them...in a loving gentle way. I'm adventuring into me......thank you all again for reading.

Your support means so much. This is a wonderful place to be...to be me.

All good stuff Babe!! You're words speak to me on what I've been journey-ing on this year. De-pussfication. Brutal honesty with my self. Acceptance of the my past. Acceptance of my character defects \[I've learned recently I'm co-dependent!! Awesome shit!  I see sooo many things I can do with that in a POSITIVE way now!\].

Be you're dream Alyson! Be it now. Everything is an illusion, so might as well make it YOUR illusion! As Jack wrote, awakening can happen in blink of the eye.

I ran across this an article on Stocism and perhaps you can find this quote helpful as you bring it all together (and you will!):

_"Any misfortune ‘that lies outside the sphere of choice’ should be considered an opportunity to strengthen our resolve, not an excuse to weaken it. This is one of the truly great mind-hacks ever devised, this willingness to convert adversity to opportunity, and it’s part of what Seneca was extolling when he wrote what he would say to one whose spirit has never been tempered or tested by hardship: **‘You are unfortunate in my judgment, for you have never been unfortunate. You have passed through life with no antagonist to face you; no one will know what you were capable of, not even you yourself.’** We do ourselves an immense favour when we consider adversity an opportunity to make this discovery – and, in the discovery, to enhance what we find there."_

All love honey! It's all coming together! Look at this time as a the well of the horseshoe: we start high on the left, hit some rough patches in the middle, then use all of our tools to climb out the right side. We all have a PhD in pain; let's use it for our benefit! Call whenever you need!

### Jack Kruse — 2015-10-28T14:29:51+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-180612>

That vision in your mind requires action. You are devoid of passion because your ideation is without execution........and that has lead to deletion of your ideas and vision. This is the source of your discontent. You have not prioritized things in your life.

Sentiment without action is the ruin of passion. Without passion some present their ruins as new castles and become empty people. Without passion, all you attain is money and fame; what comes next? You should expect scandal and shame. There is no hope or passion living large in the midst of ruin. Lightening has the power to create and destroy objects. Action, in life, is like lightening. Emulate lightning because it has the ability to animate or destroy one's life; it's up to us which side we choose to act like.

New idea’s can be quite fragile at their outset. When we first unleash them on the world they can be minimized by a "yawn"; they can also be slowly bleed to death by a sharp comment, or killed by a facial frown. But when an idea is really special, it is a rude awakening to the new dawn's sleepy eyes. A new idea is like a beautiful sunrise; it begins whispering to the world that something new is happening on the world's stage for the very first time. It's time for you to wipe the sandman from your eyes and wake up to this reality. Put some action behind you vision and watch your power animate your vision.

### Jack Kruse — 2015-11-09T14:50:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181467>

True...........but when we go raw so many will learn lessons because they are afraid to step out of line and do what you do. Hence I spend most of my mornings here looking to help you. I go where the energy needs to go just like it happens in our cells. It is a magnetic effect of light.

Most of our relationship problems are not really relationship problems at all. They're personal problems that spill over into relationships............we we are too stupid to realize it. Why? People with relationship issues always have electron problems at the core; some will suffer a serious lack of UV/IR. I got a sense in Canada that is a bigger deal.
No electrons and sunlight cannot innovate us to alter our trajectory based upon our habits. Why? Simple habits are magnetic chemical interactions that occur time and time again and we revert to them because our dopamine levels sets them in stone. How do you soften a stone? How do you cut a stone? How does nature break a rock.........???

Nature moistens it with water and then it freezes it and the rock crumbles. How else does nature do it when its warm? A tree grows into the rock and after a period of time as the bark absorbs water it fractures the rock. Water and moisture are the messenger of change and light is the energy to break habits. Why? Water is the ultimate repository of all electromagnetic radiations in this world.

How do you know you have a magnetic problem? When you are too dry. I mean this literally and figuratively. Once you get all wet you are capable of breaking any and all habits no matter what.

How to innovate dopamine? Simple assimilate UV light to your cells and the your attention will direct the energy to the correct place.

This is why Jack comes here every morning. I am drawn here to deposit some Purple knowledge. This is how journals are designed to work fundamentally. Will people learn this? I don't know and I don't care...............but I will act as I always have because I follow the beacon. When the student arrives so does the teacher................

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-09T17:29:56+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181492>

Yesterday I had a fire outside. It was cold out....zero....or 32F for my south of the border friends. I watched the fire burn the wood....the symmetry of it is beautiful. When my daughter had her MRI and I looked at the images I was struck at how the bones looked so primal and a bit like burned wood....

I thought of what Jack said ...."Become a serial killer of what your past brought. Use it as fire wood as you slow burn, because in you is a warmth that sustain you in the depths of any cold."

Everyone around the fire was freezing except me. Tank top and light sweater. What a change.

The big take away though is this.....seriel killer of what your past brought. That means the good and the bad. I think both keep me stuck

Light a match......I've sparked ......

One of the best teachers on habits is a guy from Stanford named BJ Fogg. One key to the success of his Tiny Habits program is building a celebration/reward (dopamine) loop into the performance of the desired habit.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-10T02:28:28+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181548>

Here is the blog post I wrote on the plane on Saturday night:

Building my future on the ruins cost me. It cost me reliance on self. Brick by Brick I laid my ego self upon the foundation of pain..........of wrongdoing.........of loss. Damage.
Damage was self harm. Damage was unconscious. Damage was angry.
The Damage could eurupt at the drop of a hat. Lack of dopamine fueled my rage. My wrongness felt like my rightness.
Turning this on it's head I now realize. I can't build on damage.
Foundation of self. Call it self love. Or self trust. Either way. I have taken my pain and decided to tranform it into my masterpiece.
Foundational transformation.
Must forgive.
This I have resisted all my life. Why? Because how could I forgive the unconscious. How could I forgive that which had no voice. How could I forgive the ongoing ????
Pretty fucking simple Alyson. You forgive self. I have hurt people in my damage. Hurt them A LOT. I have caused life long scars in the people I love the most. I have been so hell bent on having my story broadcast that I ran over the welcoming arms of so many.
Listen to my pain was my mantra.
Maybe I wasn't listening. Screaming this mantra louder and louder.........my inner environment became numb to the demanding cries.
Here it is. I have felt my pain every day of every moment. I feel it now and here is the thing........
It's not so scary. I am not unique.
But I am tired. I don't want another round of this. It can only be halted by my submission to it.
Forgiveness is the only way through.
LET IT GO.
I haven't been ready until now. I couldn't see my way clear. Until now.
The chrysallis has broken open...and I get to fly.
I was loved to this point. I have had some people relentlessly and fearlessly love me. I have had some people step up and decide to have my back through this. I will be eternally grateful. I will pay this forward my friends....and you know who you are....There are about 8 women and 4 men. People from far and wide. Some I haven't even met in person yet.
The next few weeks and months will be interesting. I have never really had a chance to listen to self as she has been a fucking pain in the ass for awhile and I spent a great deal of time tuning her out. I am now super interested in what she has to say. What am I going to do? Where am I going to go? What am I going to do? And....who's going with me? Or...who am I going with?
I have forgiven self for the mutilated years. I have forgiven self for the bad behaviour ... the sadistic moments......the entitlement....
I am carrying on with a refreshed perspective on me...one of potentiel. One of lightness...acceptance...full approval
I am sorry.
Please forgive me.
I love you.
Thank you.

### Jack Kruse — 2015-11-10T02:48:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181550>

Introspection creates the mirror of reflection for your personal reality. That is the way it is with a wound. Trust me as a surgeon, I know about wounds and how to heal them. The wound begins to close in on itself, to protect what is hurting so much deeper. And once it is closed, you no longer see what is underneath, what started the pain to begin with. Then you are left with a bigger problem.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-10T05:18:36+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181553>

irrigation of wound.....water.......might be tears.....might be UV.......might be awareness.....either way....pliable.....possible.....me.

Happening. Finally......let the games now begin

### Jack Kruse — 2015-11-10T14:56:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181560>

Building our future on past personal ruins costs us dearly. It works in building new cities on top of old ones, but the logic does not extend to us. Every ruin gives you a clear message: even the most durable things will turn into ruins. Our scars remind us that we did indeed survive our deepest wounds, but they are no foundation or cornerstone to build upon. Ruined things, are a redemptively sobering reminder of the fragility of past achievements not future results. Our world is first seen by the child in us, and becomes our lifelong standard. Instead of realizing the fact that we are actually admiring the ruins of our past, it often cements our habits to give us the same outcome of our parents. You shouldn't build a dream on a foundation of sand. To weather the storms of life, it must be cemented in your soul with the uncompromising conviction of the mind.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-11T07:49:45+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181640>

Highly entertaining and interesting day....let's start at the beginning.....

woke up low dopamine....meaning....I have to stay in bed until I know how to begin....usually an extra 1/2 hour...I plan what I will wear and how I will jump start my day......DONE....and ejected out into the world....

I went to work and was texting a few men. Yes....habit...addiction...call it what you may. One of them offered to come help me collect the 50 gallons of spring water an hour away...why not???

So...this is where it gets interesting.....

He jumps into my car......small, lean....Hot.....face like a fucking angel. We talk..he drops nuggets.....

"I love the cold..."......."the colder the better".....??????????

"I never get sick".........

"I don't wear contacts and rarely have my sunglasses on"

" I work outside 12-16 hours/day"

" I eat once/day"

WTF

he smokes....who cares??????????

The more he talked it was strange....like...have you read my fucking blog??? There was no way he could know....NONE...

We went for water...shared the goodness......who is this person????

Then I invited him over for a drink. He hauled all the water out for me.....WOW.....That was a treat......

We shared some red.....he says.."I really love Malbec"........OMG.....

Then....can I write this here????? First...he grabs my orange glasses and puts them on and says..."wow, you have blue blockers....."

This is fucking foreplay..............

So I had to go....and he says..."do you have a minute for some loving??".......as he kissed me I thought....."wow....this is what it feels to not have electrons stolen.......".....and I had to stop it...I DIDNT want to but needed. to.

The take away here is this: I am now starting to attract a more optimal man. There is nothing more......I am not reading into it....

Of course..he is 34....YUM and so freaking hot.

He might be a narcissist...I can't tell yet because my radar isn't totally honed yet....I am completely aware that he could be....but wow wow wow.

Ha. Thanks universe.....showing me the way......NEXT

### Jack Kruse — 2015-11-11T14:47:54+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181650>

Finding beauty in negative spaces.............is introspection. Imperfection is what all of nature is. It is what you do with it and to it that matters.

I love this post @[alyson thiessen](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/13352/). I love how you focus on what's working rather than what isn't. I love how you're guided by what you _feel_ even if your "radar isn't totally honed yet;" and I love how you can hear the voice of the universe pulling you and guiding you in the direction you want to go. Even though we don't know each other, I recognize and rejoice in your beautiful success. Bravo!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-11T21:12:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181682>

> [thisbirdhaswings said:](/goto/post?id=181581)
>
> I wonder if part of this is the difference between reacting to our past by vowing not to repeat it and vowing to create something entirely new. The difference is subtle and yet dramatic. We may think we are imagining the same future but in the first we re-create the very thing we think we want to bury. In the second we move towards an entirely new reality. Put another way, let's say I want to build connection in my current family because I did not experience that in my own. If I operate in opposition to the past, I never really get beyond it because I am still thinking about what sucked and what I'm trying to avoid. Whereas, if I find a model of someone who has created the kind of family connection I want, and replicate what they are doing, I'm focused on building something new.

This is precisely what is happening....I'm releasing it all...past...expectations....goals....What I thought I wanted I don't....what I want I do not exactly yet know.
