### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-13T08:33:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181875>

Fun eh? Today was ALL waves....surfed many....crashed a tad tonight....I would love to tell you all what happened but I can't. If this blog was private I would but it is public and I have eyes on my blog. How do I state this without stating it. The only way I know how.

Retribution that should've tasted so sweet went down like a bitter fucking pill.

That's all for tonight.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-13T19:36:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181912>

So I am going to talk about something I have wanted to but have hesitated on....I am expecting to get a barrage of negative comments on here however, I am willing. Why? Because what the fuck is the point of this blog if I can't be honest about the journey. So I am bracing for the shit storm but .... if I can't have courage then I can't grow.

I smoked from the age of 12-39. When I quit smoking I do far worse physically...I developed sleep apnea...depression became daily, my zest for life diminished and I became lacklustre. I knew that cigarettes were a medicine but they are so bad for you right? I didn't want lung cancer...although...I often thought of those people who got lung cancer that never smoked...how did that happen? The most famous...Dana Reeves...now I probably know the truth. Years spent in hospitals probably did it...just a guess.

Anyway..I faithfully didn't smoke. Gained 60-70 lbs and thought...I am far better off with the extra weight than being a smoker. Rampant Sleep apnea ensued...

Last week was stressful. I smoked some cigarettes with my cousin. It felt like a reunion. But...I didn't buy any or have any more until I got back to Alberta. I bought some this week and I can't lie...my best friend is back. I get to sit outside way more and I feel amazing. The fog lifts from my brain. I sleep better....I have energy. No longer tired. Appetite suppressed....Is this because I get to have dopamine at the drop of a hat...the light of a match? I have theories on this but don't want to put them out here for fear of looking like an idiot but suffice it to say...are cigarettes light? Unlearn everything you've learned? All my brothers smoke. All of my cousins smoke. I woke up today slightly low on dopamine...I could feel it. I woke up and went outside and had a smoke...the fog lifted....fuck.

I had to be honest so please....slam if you must but any other comments welcomed too. I have to put out here what's happening or I am just a fucking lemming.

### fitness@home — 2015-11-13T20:07:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181914>

Does nicotine in other forms (gums, spray, lozenges) have the same effect on you? Just wondered if you have ever experimented with it.

I'm not a smoker but _really_ like the lift I get from a nicotine lozenge  tucked between my cheek and gums.

p.s. or is part of the appeal the entire smoking ritual?

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-14T00:59:03+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181933>

It seems interesting to me that here in RD we now get 9 hours/sun per day ....if we are lucky. It has been overcast for days...had the time change two weeks ago and I crash like a plane on fire. It also seems to me that this is a pattern. I have purple bulbs everywhere....but haven't been able to CT for 5 days. I have been out every night this week so total exposure to blue light...I am frying myself I think. I can totally see that these patterns WILL NOT regulate here. This puts me more into a tailspin....I can't move right now. I literally can't. The dark hole deepens. Hello winter.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-14T07:41:21+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181957>

Great thoughts tonight....as the snow was falling softly....

My parents had no dopamine either.....and no knowledge. How can you do better if you don't know better? I have severe SNP's but I know I can change those...they didn't even know they had them....no consciousness that they were swimming upstream ... that they were struggling....

They did the best they had with what they had. As I am.

Thank you snow for falling gently on my soul ...
Thank you for revealing the richness beneath your blanket of white...

Thank you that I am alive and kicking....

You did the best you could....

I am doing better...with knowledge there is power...

Reign over me soul of fire.

### Sue-UK — 2015-11-14T14:40:33+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181959>

> [alyson thiessen said:](/goto/post?id=181912)
>
> So I am going to talk about something I have wanted to but have hesitated on....I am expecting to get a barrage of negative comments on here however, I am willing. Why? Because what the fuck is the point of this blog if I can't be honest about the journey. So I am bracing for the shit storm but .... if I can't have courage then I can't grow.
>
> I smoked from the age of 12-39. When I quit smoking I do far worse physically...I developed sleep apnea...depression became daily, my zest for life diminished and I became lacklustre. I knew that cigarettes were a medicine but they are so bad for you right? I didn't want lung cancer...although...I often thought of those people who got lung cancer that never smoked...how did that happen? The most famous...Dana Reeves...now I probably know the truth. Years spent in hospitals probably did it...just a guess.
>
> Anyway..I faithfully didn't smoke. Gained 60-70 lbs and thought...I am far better off with the extra weight than being a smoker. Rampant Sleep apnea ensued...
>
> Last week was stressful. I smoked some cigarettes with my cousin. It felt like a reunion. But...I didn't buy any or have any more until I got back to Alberta. I bought some this week and I can't lie...my best friend is back. I get to sit outside way more and I feel amazing. The fog lifts from my brain. I sleep better....I have energy. No longer tired. Appetite suppressed....Is this because I get to have dopamine at the drop of a hat...the light of a match? I have theories on this but don't want to put them out here for fear of looking like an idiot but suffice it to say...are cigarettes light? Unlearn everything you've learned? All my brothers smoke. All of my cousins smoke. I woke up today slightly low on dopamine...I could feel it. I woke up and went outside and had a smoke...the fog lifted....fuck.
>
> I had to be honest so please....slam if you must but any other comments welcomed too. I have to put out here what's happening or I am just a fucking lemming.

I've used gum and now using nasal spray. I think the effect changes dependent on the light .... with little or no UV its more of a mental lift, but I understand that UV converts nicotine to niacin and the effect I get is more visual. Colours seem more intense. It makes sense, if UV increases dopamine, in the presence of UV the nicotine might take a secondary path ....I'd read that sometimes giving up smoking can lead to mouth ulcers, so I wondered if, for some, giving up smoking might highlight an underlying niacin deficiency .... A regular smoker might regularly get just enough nicotine converted to niacin to stave off deficiency. The world might literally look brighter ....

Another thing I've read somewhere was that if you go outside and relax with a cigarette, the deep relaxing breath has an effect, the principle being that if the diaphragm muscles were relaxed, the rest of the muscles tended to follow .... Maybe worth trying going outside and using a nasal spray and doing some "as if smoking" breathing ...?

### Jack Kruse — 2015-11-14T15:54:30+0200

When you embrace the sun, now becomes most powerful, and it's the dark's turn to be afraid. Try not to afraid because it shortens time on Earth. Without the sun our life becomes a series of fears. You become afraid you’ll be a book that no one reads. Music that no one listens to anymore. You'll be afraid you’ll be abandoned like a movie playing in an empty theater.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-15T01:02:04+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-181990>

Let me say here...I failed science...I know very little other than what I glean here and from reading....I feel like a neophyte with EVERYTHING....HOWEVER....some things came together for me today .... comments welcomed and also turnarounds welcomed given neophyte status....

What if this was WW3 and what if the EMP happened and all chips/computers/communication was wiped out....who would survive??? I had this conversation today and here is what I came up with.

1\. You don't need as much food as you think. You need the sun. If you can get yourself south near the equator the chance of survival increases exponentially. However....to get there you have to be ahead of the curve on the thinking...once the event happens...could be next to impossible to do.

2\. If you have an optimal gut biome and don't eat garbage then you have a greater chance of survival. People who eat foods that are non indigenous to their latitude will be fucked. They will have a hard time adapting to the new reality. Once their canned shit runs out...then what??? They will have a hard time digesting and getting what they need from raw meat.

3\. Cold adaption. 80% of the wealth in the world is in a colder climate. If the EMP happened in winter which, if I was a betting person I would think it would then all those who aren't cold adapted will struggle. How can they catch up???? Cold adaption takes time....they won't be able to do what they need to do b/c they will struggle with being cold.

4\. The resources to mobilize me are fuel and water. I am buying jerry cans and filling with 50 L of fuel and keeping my tank full at all times...that is enough to get me to the ocean. The West coast is so unoptimal but I can survive there until I can make my journey south.

5\. If you can harvest enough UV you become unstoppable b/c suddenly food becomes a LOW priority...think about it. IT'S NOT ABOUT FOOD. People will kill for food....they don't know how to stop the hunger....if you are optimal you just look up.

Our construct in North America is fucked. When I look at the above and then I look at suburban culture I want to vomit...we have lost what is important. We have lost what life is about. We have lost our primal selves and traded it in for comfort and laziness. Thank you heat and electricity.

I always thought I would have nothing to contribute when the shit hits the fan. But I will. Those that can keep up and keep going without warmth and food are of value. Those that can teach their tribe to harvest the UV will be of value. Those that KNOW WHERE TO GO will be of value. And those that can understand how genes adapt will be of value. The environment will change....and the genes will too....

I am not optimal of body yet but I sure feel like I GOT IT today. Optimal being less about what you look like in a bikini and more about if you can keep up. Optimal being about KNOWING what's happening...having consciousness about change...having consciousness about chaos.

This shit is getting real in more ways than one.

### Jack Kruse — 2015-11-15T15:42:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182027>

Everything is a light issue. Welcome to the new world order.

What does light change in you?

Light helps you lead a life of your own choosing. Not the one mapped out for you by others.

We become what we think about when we are under the sun.

The sun's light allows you to be of service to others.

Build. Work. Dream. Create using light

Be kind is easier under the sun's direction

Be charitable is easy under the sun because you see others in their natural light

Forgive yourself every morning to renew. This is the power of AM light

Make your past serve your present because the only part of you life you can change is the present using light

The problem with most people is their desire to conform to a life designed by someone else. Use your light not theirs.

There was a time you had dreams and ambitions that kept you awake at night. Now the only thing that keeps you awake is fear.

Where did you get the idea you can’t be successful? Might it be your alien sun worship?

Ask yourself, “Why do you work? Why do you get up in the morning?” Is it to use tech gadgets or to see the sun?

Successful people who those who do deliberately that which they want to do well because the sun build their ability to choose wisely consistently

Have goals not whims, the sun builds that ability in you

Most people work harder to prevent themselves from losing than they do to develop their dreams because they are missing purple and red light.

You have to decide. Will I invest in myself to build the life I deserve or will I stay the course? The decision rests on the light that turns on or off your frontal lobes.

What do you want? Do you want to be wealthy so you can do more good or set an example of making excuses?

Good luck can work for you. Doubt and fear can be the things of the past. Since we become what we think about it makes sense for us to change our thoughts regardless of our circumstances. Transformation is easiest in nature when the sun gives you signs of what to do.

If you wish to be rich you can be rich. If you think about poverty you will be poor. Energy flows to where you think.

If you think in negative terms you will reap negative results. If you think in positive terms you will achieve success. Light is the key to the direction and flow of this energy.

A life of frustration is determined by what we think about. Light cuts energy vampires around you. You see them in the light of day and no longer let them pull your strings to the darkness.

It is up to you to make of your life what you must.......everyday the sun rises.

It is not fate or divinity that keeps you in poverty. It is your thinking that cloaks you in confusion and poverty because you live in your shadows. Live in your light and your shadows will disappear.

What you focus on has to produce an outcome. Just as light focus through a magnifying glass to turn a spark to a flame you too can ignite your life with the focus of light.

If you think negative thoughts about your relationship you will help realize a relationship that is less than you deserve.

You are where you are because you do more to stay there than change your conditions of existence. The light you allow determines the reality you get.

You can change everything in your life with a simple power only you can control unless your quantum yield: Your thoughts are tied to the light your eye senses.

Very few people accept the fact that they can have anything they want if they think in faith that they deserve to be.

We convince ourselves that we are victors or victims by our thoughts. Purple light gives wins and blue light build victims.

Nothing comes unannounced, but many can miss the announcement. So it’s very important to actually listen to your own intuition rather than driving through it………our own inner GPS is the best guidance of all. Purple and red are the key to you inner GARMIN.

As you believe it is revealed whatever it truly is. No one can control you unless you give them the remote.

Have courage. Take action. Ideas are meaningless unless you take forward action. Ideation with execution leads to deletion of all good ideas.

What is it you want? What is you would improve about your life if you had a magic wand? That wand is your light saber.

You have as much right to being a success as anyone else. But to do so you have to stop thinking about what you fear. Bend the bars of your cage.

Remove every negative thought because you deserve better. Light allows your to become un-stuck.

Take control of your mind before your beliefs take control of you.

Do more than you have to do because your reality depends upon it.

I want you to think as though nothing can be denied you. Certain light denies you to natural truth.

You can't get away from yourself by moving from one place to another because the light still follows your every move.

Remove every fear from you by shining sunlight on the problem.

Be calm and cheerful when you are drinking sunlight.

You have a dream for a reason. Don’t leave it buried. It does not do to dwell on dreams and forget to live.

That is all. Carry On. And your lack of science education is not hurting you at all.......it helping your mind remain awake to what those who think they know science snicker at.

### nonchalant — 2015-11-15T17:57:24+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182032>

> [thisbirdhaswings said:](/goto/post?id=181999)
>
> I think one of the most liberating things is realizing we don't really \*need\* food. This first came to my attention with the so-called "breatharians" who (supposedly) can live without food or watee. I've read critics that call into question whether these breatharians really are living that way, but it seems plausible to me. Plausible and very freeing.

Christine, I learned another lesson from my guinea fowl the other day. I saw them gather in the sunny spots, as usual, but I also noticed some of them digging in the dirt and making little depressions in the soil. Then they would crouch down and sun themselves, stretching out their wings and 'purring' -- happiness, I suppose. None of this is unusual, except that it was fairly nippy outside. They have been digging holes all this summer, to my DH's consternation, but I knew it was to cool off, like dogs do. But since the temps were low, I realized that they were grounding!

That sunshine must have been streaking through them, on it's way to the earth.
Sure, they are grounded most of the time. Even at night they prefer to perch in the trees, instead of the nice coop we built. But sometimes they must need a little more.

> What you focus on has to produce an outcome. Just as light focus through a magnifying glass to turn a spark to a flame you too can ignite your life with the focus of light.
>
> If you think negative thoughts about your relationship you will help realize a relationship that is less than you deserve.
>
> You are where you are because you do more to stay there than change your conditions of existence. The light you allow determines the reality you get.
>
> You can change everything in your life with a simple power only you can control unless your quantum yield: Your thoughts are tied to the light your eye senses.
>
> Very few people accept the fact that they can have anything they want if they think in faith that they deserve to be.
>
> We convince ourselves that we are victors or victims by our thoughts. Purple light gives wins and blue light build victims.
>
> Nothing comes unannounced, but many can miss the announcement. So it’s very important to actually listen to your own intuition rather than driving through it………our own inner GPS is the best guidance of all. Purple and red are the key to you inner GARMIN.
>
> As you believe it is revealed whatever it truly is. No one can control you unless you give them the remote.
>
> Have courage. Take action. Ideas are meaningless unless you take forward action. Ideation with execution leads to deletion of all good ideas.
>
> What is it you want? What is you would improve about your life if you had a magic wand? That wand is your light saber.
>
> You have as much right to being a success as anyone else. But to do so you have to stop thinking about what you fear. Bend the bars of your cage.
>
> Remove every negative thought because you deserve better. Light allows your to become un-stuck.
>
> Take control of your mind before your beliefs take control of you.
>
> Do more than you have to do because your reality depends upon it.
>
> I want you to think as though nothing can be denied you. Certain light denies you to natural truth.
>
> You can't get away from yourself by moving from one place to another because the light still follows your every move.
>
> Remove every fear from you by shining sunlight on the problem.
>
> Be calm and cheerful when you are drinking sunlight.
>
> You have a dream for a reason. Don’t leave it buried. It does not do to dwell on dreams and forget to live.
>
> That is all. Carry On. And your lack of science education is not hurting you at all.......it helping your mind remain awake to what those who think they know science snicker at.

Oh ya....Like Lady Gaga would say,

"I'm on the right track baby I was born that way!"

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-20T17:02:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182428>

Now that I know what I know....things make more sense. Everyone around me is complaining of not feeling good...everyone is tired, lethargic and cranky. Everyone's eyes are bloodshot....lips chapped....we are all approaching winter with impending doom....and I know why....we just don't have what we need....being at 2850 ft above sea level with minimal sun/day....and even when we get sun.....it's so far away......

This society keeps extending it's night time with blue light. They keep doing and doing and doing....well past 10pm....

Since red lighting my house when I come home, I make a quick light supper, do my chores and then.....blue blockers on and I spend a couple hours reading or sitting by the fire talking with my daughter....by 9pm we yawn and head to bed. Sometimes it's 8pm when we go to sleep. We get cozy in our cold house and have the most amazing sleeps...ever. We wake up refreshed....pound water and thank the day and start anew.....

I get it. I am not supposed to be running around every night exposed to HUGE amounts of blue light.

Now that I know better......I am doing better.

I am so excited about going to Fort Lauderdale tomorrow and starting the cruise Monday. I will harvest so much light...water...light....CT....I will have so much ice in my room. Massive amounts of seafood and fish. When I return I plan on hibernating at night....literally staying home most nights and doing sweet F A . Thank goodness Im not a christmas person....malls are the bane of my existence and let's face it...the bane of everyone's existence....I don't do malls.

I plan on using a nic patch the whole time and seeing how I feel with the light....ditching the smoking.

No sunglasses packed. Just blue blockers.

I am hoping this DOSE of light keeps me until the end of December..after then I think I will have to go find some more UVA/UVB....

Any other suggestions are welcomed. And yes....nude sun catching as often as possible on my deck....watching the sunrise every morning will be my biggest joy....Its funny...I always loved sunrises but now...the gratitude that washes over me when I see the sunrise is incredible...you only have 25000 sunrises in your lifetime....

Although I will miss my magnetico I will be ON THE SEA.....2850 down to lets say 200 feet above...I think lack of magnetico will be ok.

Oh....just a point on the smoking thing...my head feels better ... emotions more stable.....my body???? DOESNT. Aches, pains....

As for the Cryo therapy????? Meh......Doesn't hit neck enough....legs got down to 11C .... it's not something I will bother with much. Nothing like the water.

### cinnamon — 2015-11-21T03:15:21+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182449>

Enjoy your cruise, Alyson! It will be fantastic soaking up all that sun!

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-29T17:38:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182835>

I'm back....traveled from 630am EST to midnight MST....

I'm still wobbling back and forth with sea legs...interesting phenomenon...

This was the trip of frustration....tons of failure/feedback....with some pretty big ah ha moments...and a few awe inspiring moments...

Other than some huge snafu's with the travel planners (I was on a group trip and had NO CONTROL of anything...and major errors were made....this frustrates me b/c I am a high level planner...I see outcomes...I plan for everything...especially when it's travel....) the biggest frustration was my inability to harvest UV. I ground down like a coffee bean in a grinder. I was so excited to be on the ocean....and get UV....now I have some ideas why.

My first two days were in Fort Lauderdale. I was able to UV on the beach as well as swim a lot. These were two of my best days...even my travel down seemed easy. I had plenty of energy to spare after a 15 hour day. THIS WAS NEW.

I got on the boat on Monday the 23rd. The air started to sink out of my tires fairly quickly. The ability to get water was challenging ... particularly cold water. With having to only get one at a time I was frustrated. There was a lot of waiting around that day....Once I got into my room I filled up my big ziplocs with ice and did some spot CT. That seemed to carry me through the evening. I had dinner at the restaurant (avoiding the buffet) and had salmon. It was nice but my mouth started to react...then came Tuesday......

I was so tired Tuesday....got my morning UV.....ordered ice......but my body had started to swell and no matter how much I iced or swam....to no avail. First of all I noticed a heavy salting/MSGing of the food....msg is enemy number one for me...I can't recover from it. Second, no matter how much water I drank I couldn't hydrate. Simply felt thirsty constantly. My mouth started to get sores.....I went to bed for the afternoon....I ordered three buckets of ice...closed my drapes and sunk into the cave for a couple hours...this mitigated slightly. That night I was in bed by 9.

Wednesday was Cozumel. We had little choice on excursions so I picked the catamaran with snorkelling and beach. THIS WAS MY BEST DAY....WONDER WHY.

The moment I dove off the boat I felt like I had just dove into myself. I put my mask on and started to swim. Everyone was complaining there was nothing to see....sure, this wasn't the reef in maui but...I felt like I was seeing EVERYTHING. I just capitulated to the water and the slow rolling of the sea.....watching how everything moved in sync....looking at the particulate in the water......watching the fish and the plants below move and undulate.....my thought was...is this my body? Is this a reflection of what happens in me? I felt so grounded, alive, aware .... I felt like me. I kept getting yelled at by the guide to 'stay in the group!!!!"....whatever....I did my thing. We got on the boat and went to a beach. I spent time both on the beach and in the water. In the water was where I did best. We went back and got caught up in a rainstorm...I loved it. I was the only one not under the canopy. The rain sanctified me.

After this AWESOME day I ended up going to bed at 9. I realized how badly the blue light inside the boat was effecting me. I wasn't willing (my bad) to where double glasses i.e.; blue blockers over my blue blockers and my blue techs couldn't save me. As well, the wifi had issues and everyone was trying to connect....fucking WIFRI...

Woke up Thursday....morning UV....water...rinse and repeat. Did a lot of sunning and some swimming. I started to really feel bad and then what did I do? I ATE BUFFET. Now...I am not a big eater anymore by any stretch. I ate max twice a day on the boat with no snack. I was so hungry that I ate some crap.......my legs were out of control. My mouth swelled up....and I couldn't hydrate. I was literally peeing every 20 minutes. My body said NO. Bed again by 9. I just didn't want to party with everyone else.

Friday. Key West. I couldn't with certainty track down a beach. So, I decided to stay on the boat and enjoy the place without all the noise. I had 3 full hours of morning UV with plenty of back and forth in the pools. NO ONE WAS THERE. And here is another take away...the boat is like Vegas on the water. SO MUCH NOISE...SO MANY PEOPLE...AND PLENTY OF STUPIDITY. I leeched electrons. They clearly poured out of me.... The day was very solid and I felt like I had recuperated slightly. My legs wouldn't drain ... we had a dinner that night and bed by 11.

Saturday. Disembark day and travel back home. A cold/bronchitis settled nicely into my body. First time ill in 2 years. I just took it in stride...I am already feeling better today. (not smoking)

There is WAY more to this story. I did drink beer. Which funny enough usually gets my legs swelling but I drank it in Cozumel. My body handled it fine on the beach...why did I drink beer? I didn't want ice from Mexico....and I had to have something. As well....the water all had ice... Oh...this is funny too....a guy on the boat was identified as diabetic....he DIDN'T snorkel and opted to stay on the boat and drink margaritas all day.......COME ON.

Takeaways:

My redox sucks.
I MUST CT every day without fail. I MUST make it a priority .... I have made a deal with myself. If I can only get my legs in then that is ok. I know myself...once I am in waist down for 10 minutes, I can easily put rest of body in.
Blue light is fucking killer. KILLER. Now that I know about it....holy cow. It is EVERYWHERE. MUST LIMIT.
Never go on a trip where I had zero control of my elements and the basics for my optimization. PERIOD.
What the hell goes into the food on that ship??????????
People steal my awesome electrons.
Know the enemy.
I must find a place I can go south to that is consistent, on the gulf. My airfare to Tampa for example is about 1200 return CDN. I need a place that is simple but has a good bed, beach access and is FAR FROM THE MADDENING CROWD. I am researching that now.

Now....I am going to end this with some really cool people stories.

I met a couple from Jacksonville Fl. I Noticed I'm right away. He was sitting in the smoking section and had a walker. I was curious as to what was wrong as he looked barely 60. He was getting up on Tuesday and was struggling. I asked if he needed a hand. He extended his arm immediately and I helped him up. We spent every day together for at least an hour after that. I met his wife and on the Thursday I asked what he had. It's Lou Gerigs...maybe???? He has no firm diagnosis. He formerly was a College professor of English. 15 year ago he went to turn his body left and it wouldn't....this started his medical journey. I started to talk about the basics and about Jack. I asked how much morning UV he gets...how much water he drinks....etc.......He drink 2 Tbsp of water a day....wears glasses and barely gets down to the water every day (they are ocean front). I gently started to share ....his eyes lit up. The spark of Hope. I brought his wife into the conversation...she got excited. The next day we talked a bit further. I kept the topic on the basics. Then I suggested to Henry he start to read about it. He agreed. That day he drank 1/2 litre of water. I have no idea where this will go as they have to drive the bus on his healing....but I loved sharing .... and I loved the complete nod of truth. It's so obvious.

I also had several conversations with ladies in our group. It's so interesting to me that people LOVE TO TALK ABOUT THEIR HEALTH ISSUES.....it's rampant. I would tease them a bit with a little info....their eyes would go wide....One lady I talked to for a few hours....I left it with my blue light story and the 10lbs that flew off once I eliminated blue light after 6. She said, "send my the info".....

I met these two awesome guys from Kentucky. They are the nicest couple. We spend hours together every day. I swear he is my brother from another life. He now calls me sister. We were drawn to each other so quickly. They were so phenomenal to me....I Posted a pic of my face on FB yesterday and he commented, "there is my beautiful sister".....there is restoration.

Something else has happened. I met a guy over 3 weeks ago. We talked A LOT before we met. I sparked him up about Jack. He immediately climbed onto the wagon. He is listening to podcasts and learning. He gets morning UV, started eating salmon and put red lights throughout his house......His filament is starting to glow....I really put him through the paces in many ways. We had two dates prior to me leaving....no sex...not BS....just talk and kisses. I just have a feeling about him....oh did I mention????? HE'S KIND. He's nice. He's cute  When I teach him he listens and then he does. He is open to getting cold adapted. Most men collapse on this talking about shrinkage......sigh.

So....I am happy to be back....and I know I need to get back to the ocean to reset ... and I need more than a couple days. I need to inquire about a few weeks....I think I just needed more UV...more ocean....LESS BLUE LIGHT AND COMMOTION.

My thinking got all scrambled eggs on the boat too.....I think because I was in survival mode. All I could focus on was ..where is the water.....I need to drink it.....now I have to pee.....

I am sure I missed a few things.....will post later if I remember.

### shah78 — 2015-11-29T19:13:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182840>

"SHRINKAGE" is only temporary. The "REBOUND" effect exists for the other twenty three hours of the day and night.. IMHO.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-11-29T20:55:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182844>

Just watched the movie "After words"...set in Costa Rica....HOLY COW....light, water and magnetism is total truth. As I watched her dopamine rise......the truth set deeper into my soul...here is the quote that ended the movie:

**“The best remedy for those who are afraid, lonely or unhappy is to go outside, somewhere where they can be quite alone with the heavens, nature and God. Because only then does one feel that all is as it should be and that God wishes to see people happy, amidst the simple beauty of nature. As longs as this exists, and it certainly always will, I know that then there will always be comfort for every sorrow, whatever the circumstances may be. And I firmly believe that nature brings solace in all troubles.”**

― [Anne Frank](http://www.goodreads.com/author/show/3720.Anne_Frank), _[The Diary of a Young Girl](http://www.goodreads.com/work/quotes/3532896)_

The best remedy for everyone. Universe.....you know I have Costa Rica in my heart, mind and soul....show me.

### shah78 — 2015-11-29T21:45:41+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182847>

Whenever I do a Myers=Briggs personality test my Introvert/Extrovert score always comes out dead even. I can take or leave having company. Both are great. Obviously the quality of the company matters most......But Anne Frank is spot on. Five hours days in the Gulf of Mexico this past summer standing next to a bouey I named "Wilson" took away any concept of loneliness that resided in my body/mind. Nature rocks.

Costa Rica is AWESOME, especially in the mountains by the volcanoes. That is where I felt the best, touching and climbing over the lava rocks.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-01T17:33:39+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182981>

Mulling this over the past few days.....

As I watched the ocean move I saw everything move in concert....the ocean is not stagnant....

I think I am a dehydrated cesspool....

I don't move enough ....

I noticed yesterday that the more I moved, the more I coughed (I have a cold). This got me thinking of the plants at the bottom of the ocean....as the ocean rolled, so did they.....

Must move more.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-01T21:38:22+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-182997>

I had this dream the other night that I can't forget. I was in a grocery store looking for eggs. I wanted one doz. I couldn't find a package with one doz so I looked at getting 2 doz. I opened the package to inspect the eggs before I grabbed them and there was like 6 eggs in there and they were either REALLY BIG or tiny....it was odd....I kept opening packages and the same thing kept happening. Someone walked up to me and said, "people keep taking out the uniform eggs so that all their eggs are the same size. They don't like odd sizes"....so then I proceeded to get bacon....I couldn't find it...the lady said it was 'over there'....i walked over and I could see the bacon but couldn't reach it.....and then, I awoke.

### Jack Kruse — 2015-12-01T22:39:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183001>

Big and little eggs = regular eggs..........

### Jack Kruse — 2015-12-02T01:34:07+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183014>

Alyson I really want to know why this trip sucked for you considering you were in the sun?

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-02T21:27:05+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183085>

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=183014)
>
> Alyson I really want to know why this trip sucked for you considering you were in the sun?

The sun was the best and most redeeming part. I just had a hard time handling being with people all the time...small talk....too much drinking....and blue light constantly inside at night. My legs swelled up and I couldn't get them back down...this always gets me very down. There was also shenanigans with my roommate that really frustrated me. Oh...and I had my period REALLY BAD the entire trip....plus having to pee every twenty minutes.....couldn't relax. Of course, Cozumel was perfect as was fort lauderdale...being in the water rather than on top of it...I crave it.

If I could narrow it down though....legs swelling.

Then got home to a nasty cold....still feel like shit....spending afternoon outside in 30F in the sun....going to CT my lungs by breathing deep

Thanks for asking....any thoughts Jack?

### Jack Kruse — 2015-12-02T22:41:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183091>

### thomas — 2015-12-03T18:28:40+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183184>

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-05T22:10:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183416>

So even though I'm in a sub optimal environment living in Alberta....I can see that I have mitigated for a lot of this via my lifestyle....

I have been home a week....started deep CT again.....ah...my friend CT......

I weigh less than before the cruise....my size 16's are falling off....I'm wearing a bra size I haven't been in for decades....My appetite has been low since returning except for today....I deep CT'd this morning and at noon I became ravenous....3 egg omelette....bacon fat....3 pieces of bacon and salmon....devoured it ALL.....lot's of water....lots of morning UV. So yes....sub optimal due to postal code but fuck....I have made amazing changes that make me feel incredible. This is a controlled environment...the cruise was not.

As well.....I just DON'T do blue light after 5pm. I have candles and red and black lights....this makes such a difference for me....

So no, cruise not a failure....If I could've CT'd a couple times a day it would've been better. My ass is in the cold again finally.

AND...I am being very careful at what I say yes to this holiday season....I'm not a fan of being out at night ESPECIALLY DRIVING....my blue blockers make it hard to drive on unlit roads. So much blue light....and of course, electron stealers....so tonight I have decided to trek out.....and I am doing what I can to mitigate.

### endless — 2015-12-05T22:12:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183418>

I'm the same....was supposed to go out last night but opted to stay home in my cave instead.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-05T22:52:48+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183424>

Interesting dream last night....I was skydiving and upon landing I collapsed and let the parachute cover me and couldn't breath....might've been an apnea event...

Also.....I do know...had I CT'd faithfully once or twice a day I would've done better on the cruise.....resting on the laurels of my past will only serve to cripple my future. Every day.....Every new day.....better choices....and my choices have been really good this week...maybe my dopamine is rising.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-05T22:53:20+0200

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-05T23:01:37+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-183427>

I was asked the other day by a guy reading my journal how many of the goals I had reached that I wrote down in summer....so here is the list.....let's go through it:

1\. Must get a magnetico. I am hoping that it will impact my Sleep apnea for the better. GOT IT IN SEPTEMBER
2\. Must get a landline with a corded phone. GOT IT IN SEPTEMBER
3\. Must get orange screen filters for every device GOT THEM IN SEPTEMBER
4\. Must turn off technology by 6pm nightly NOT 100% THERE
5\. Must CT 2-3 times daily WAS DOING THIS FAITHFULLY...NOW I AM DOING 1 FOR SURE IN THE TUB AT 45-50F
6\. Must eat almost exclusively seafood. YES!
7\. Must avoid people and situations that point me backwards. IE; electron stealers. YES!!!
8\. Must start some type of HIIT NOT DOING THIS
9\. I am only allowed to have a boyfriend that is optimal. PERIOD. I met someone a month ago and he said a lot of "yes, 'yes, yes"....well, I went to his house tonight....and it's NO NO NO....NO! Too much to turn around there. I am way ahead of him....it's not possible and I don't want to add another person to my train....hard enough doing it on my own. THIS IS ALMOST THE MOST IMPORTANT ONE....VAMPIRES ARE OUT!!!!!

The great white shark never worries where she'll get her food....and sharks never eat their own......

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-14T21:18:49+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-184113>

Solstice in 7 days....first day of real sun is today ....first in 5 days. I feel triumphant.

I am reflecting over the past year and enjoying connecting the dots. A year ago I was into BP coffee and had just collected my first 25gallons of spring water. Today I am still collecting that water every few weeks...I've ditched the BP...I regularly ice this body of mine....and I seek the light. UV always for the win.

I am sleeping like a hibernating bear....have to be in bed by 9....sleep until 7.....

I hosted a candle lit party at my house on Friday...when the girls went outside (and it was new moon) they all exclaimed it was so bright out....LOL.....fuck you blue light.

Not much to report...or much I can right now....I am munching on outrage at the red necks in our province who are threatening to kill our premier b/c she is a woman and NDP or to my American friends....very much a democrat.....I am feeling this on a deep level and have a response percolating....it's capturing some of my electrons. Ignorance and bravado mixed in with ALOT of misogyny is a recipe for Alyson to stand very tall...not righteously but in truth. To threaten to kill another human because you aren't 'getting your way' makes me doubt the hallmarks of democracy. Still percolating...more to follow.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-16T19:06:03+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-184301>

I have spent 47 years fighting winter. Born in a northern town...and raised in another northern town...there has only been 2 winters where I had a reprieve from the cold. The dark though I have had my whole life. As I capitulate to my rhythm I see no need to run around to the mall or to many parties....I feel in me a need to retreat...be alone...and do very little. I railed against this for years seeing myself as weak and unmotivated. Now I know the truth. I need to hibernate. My body is saying "rest" for the summer is coming.

The trees are laden with snow and on the occasional day the sun shines bright they stretch for the sun; snow melting and water dripping gently. The trees are filled with crows and magpies as a dark foil against the stark white. My paradise is my deck where I sit for hours and my thoughts are slow and sometimes non existent. Analysis no longer fills my mind...wonder and curiosity gently cascade through me. All I need to know I know on a cellular level. No need to scurry about....life is too short for mindless activity.

In winter I empty. The stores of summer are depleting. And I welcome this as I welcome the morning sun that fills my eyes with renewal.

\*\*\*\*thoughts on a cold winter morning as I decided to work from home in my PJ's.

### Jack Kruse — 2015-12-18T15:18:36+0200

### Joe Gavin — 2015-12-18T19:01:17+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-184467>

> [Jack Kruse said:](/goto/post?id=184454)
>
> She knows how to go all the way on this pale blue dot..............1523.

[http://photobiology.info/Hamblin.html](http://photobiology.info/Hamblin.html)

From Hamblin: The second important consideration involves the optical properties of tissue. Both the absorption and scattering of light in tissue are wavelength dependent (both much higher in the blue region of the spectrum than the red), and the principal tissue chromophore (hemoglobin) has high absorption bands at wavelengths shorter than 600 nm. For these reasons, there is a so-called "optical window". The second important consideration involves the optical properties of tissue. Both the absorption and scattering of light in tissue are wavelength dependent (both much higher in the blue region of the spectrum than the red), and the principal tissue chromophores (hemoglobin and melanin) have high absorption bands at wavelengths shorter than 600 nm. **Water begins to absorb significantly at wavelengths greater than 1150 nm.** For these reasons, there is a so-called "optical window" in tissue covering the red and NIR wavelengths, where the effective tissue penetration of light is maximized (Figure 2). Therefore, although blue, green and yellow light may have significant effects on cells growing in optically transparent culture medium, the use of LLLT in animals and patients almost exclusively involves red and NIR light (600 - 950 nm).

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-22T01:43:03+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-184724>

Year in Review 2015.....

One year ago I collected my first 25 gallons of spring water. I felt triumphant....I had been listening ardently to Bulletproof radio and wanted to up my game. Little did I know what was to come.

I drank Bulletproof coffee for about 5 months....the MCT and grassed butter did something for me...the coffee? Not so much.

I continued to struggle in a search to lose weight and ultimately love self. I was riding a hard self hate train....Now I know....lack of dopamine.

In March someone added me to Quantum on Facebook. I started lurking around and then commented on something.....WHACK ON THE HEAD.....WHOOPS....I continued to lurk and posted my 'Issues'.....Jack told me to look under my ass....he nailed it.....electric heated seats in car....I have never had them on since. Little did I know my naivety when it came to my issues...and even if complex....they are simple.

I continued to lurk but didn't 'get it'.....I really didn't get it....I read, listened and read some more.....

Then I hired Ruben to jet start me .... we had two consults and he laid out the program....he's such a hard ass!

I put my quantum lifestyle to the test with mixed results....I had no idea why....but the knowledge continued to trickle into my foggy brain.....then....I started CT....with a passion.

CT was like someone opening the windows in spring.......the light went ON. I became intent on daily CT and then the lake unfroze....I started going in early June....50F .... I would sun and CT and rinse and repeat....the sun came out in my soul. I began to connect dots....

Then came August....the LID CAME OFF.....literally. My infamous page 9 on this journal....I just vomited up my life. Jack continued to poke me saying "woman is not who she thinks she is"....that haunted me....but I love Jack's promptings...rarely will he throw cold water onto me....he gently nudges me with his breadcrumbs and for that I am thankful.

There is so much I will share later...the is the prelude.....

Just know......JK your knowledge and love and this community saved my life. Saved me from myself.
I now know who I am. Alyson. Just Alyson.

### Jack Kruse — 2015-12-22T02:03:06+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-184729>

I wish everyone did journal updates like this for the end of the year in review..........they are simply awesome places where we come to write what really moved us off the mark............and that nudge maybe important for others or even ourselves.

### alyson thiessen — 2015-12-24T17:56:43+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-184872>

Part 2 of 2015 recap.

I had no idea that by journalling and going down the road of optimal that my emotions would heal. That I would heal deep core wounds....I thought I would talk only about the regular 'health stuff'.....well this journal this year taught me...personal thunderstorm is everything. Entanglement.....as the fog lifted I recognized it's all connected. My lower choices were lack of UV....lack of Vit D....lack of dopamine....

2nd biggest breakthrough this year was when I cracked down on blue light....Mid september when I moved to the lake. I refuse to put lights on after dark....and I limit my light during the day. Filters on EVERYTHING....when I did that....BOOM.....10lbs gone....AND fog lifted more. I started going to sleep between 8 and 9...waking up refreshed .... this is a first. I have to be honest....when my friends complain about their massive headaches while frenetically gripping their cell phone and iPad and shining blue light into their eyes CONSTANTLY I laugh....they ask me what to do...FUCK REALLY????? Turn that shit off and get into a cold bath....it really is that simple. They want a pill. Go take your omega 3 and advil and have a great life....seriously......fuck.

Let's talk moods. I shed the self hate this year. Like I really shed that shit right off me like skin off a snake. Once this vacated I found that I almost live my whole life in meditation...a girlfriend said I had become VERY ZEN....I prefer VERY QUANTUM.... either way....it's noticed. I am the girl people turn to and they are safe.

Last night my daughter and I exchanged gifts and we sat in a red lit room with the fire on and I was present for the entire night...like truly present....that's the gift. Presence is the gift. Today is all you have.

I'm off to the mountains for a day and then off to Vancouver for a few days to visit my daughter and my parents....yup...I am doing that. The rage is gone. Replaced with my inner fire and light..... light water and magnetism for the win

### alyson thiessen — 2016-01-01T05:10:09+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-185208>

**PANDORA'S BOX-THE BROKEN ARROW EDITION
**
**I**T'S New Years eve....2015. Where have you been...where are you going? What's your word for 2015? I know what mine is...."foundation".

What an incredible week this has been. It has summed up the whole year.

Pandora's box was opened....not a dirty little cage....but a beautiful mosaic that no one bothered to ever ask about.

As some of you know, I got engaged this week......WTF?????

I was the girl that didn't want ANYONE.....until SOMEONE showed up.....no fucking kidding.......

My SONG was and is .. Broken Arrow by Robbie Robertson. .... Broken arrow means in native "Peace"...
He's brought me peace.

Bridged the gap with my family....
Bridged the gap with myself.

He cared and dared to ask the question: " what is it that you're not telling me....stop hiding Alyson.". So....I told him.

All my secrets ...... I told.
The biggest secret was this:

"The girl who gets what she wants doesn't want it".

BOOM

Pandoras box exploded.

There it is my friends.....for all to see.

I am now declaring....I want what I want. I see what I see. I am what I am. I love it.

The darkness isn't so scary.

Found the man I want to unpack with.

Fuck you Doug!!!!

Holy cow....2016.....BRING IT!!!!! COLD WATER.......UV.......MAGNETISM............

JACK.....turning my whole world around.........

Your life has been leading up to this .....it was all so necessary .....and now watch out - here comes the beyond!

Buckle up ....it is going to be a huge, huge ride - destination unknown - but it will be completely awesome!

No turning back now girl - you are in forward motion......

### alyson thiessen — 2016-01-07T17:20:50+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-185646>

7 Days into 2016.......

Smoking is gone.
Drinking is gone.

I am left with an eerie silence that pervades my soul.....

I like it.

This all isn't that difficult. Try things.....get rid of things......try something else.....most importantly...BE AWARE.

I was getting mixed results. I've always got mixed results and it is probably a function of my denial to the reality staring me in the face.

I lived the last 60 days sub optimal....and it ground me down. I could feel it....I could see it.....dopamine silently leaving me.....replaced with choices that aren't me.

I was going to say "back to what I know"...but that is going forward in reverse....

Stepping forward into the light.

### alyson thiessen — 2016-02-07T17:22:25+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-188478>

Good morning...it's been a month. What a month it's been  I've been pondering a couple things this past month and I thought I was going to write about the returning of the sun. How my body is breathing a huge sigh of relief with the days getting longer again. How I have deeply begun to understand that the sun DEMANDS attention. It is our days. But no....this isn't the topic for me today.....

I love CT. I know......NOT big news for those of you who have followed me. However.....I have gained a new appreciation for CT and how it mirrors our lives....let me drill down on that a bit.

I have been noticing how people brace for difficult times. It's like they go kicking and screaming into the darkness of self thinking, "this can't be happening to me....this is so wrong!!!!!!!! Where is the light?????" And while they are in that darkness they rail and writhe and continue to think that it is not useful. How can pain be useful??? How can the darkness be anything but dangerous and scary. That my friends I believe is blue light thinking. As I sink into the dark every night and light my way in the red and through the fire I have become less afraid of the darkness. Tucking into the dark my body and mind regenerate and I can face the light of day in a way that I never could before. Problems become moments in time to just be noticed and handled. Problems no longer are insurmountable. This doesn't mean I don't sometimes have anxiety or pain...I do. But now...it's just anxiety and pain. Sometimes I talk to it and say, "oh hello MOA snp....I see you are firing today." or "Hmmmmm I have anxiety....lets have a cold bath and raise my dopamine".....

The cold bath for me is the deepest metaphorical lesson so far in my life. When I sink into the 40F bath it is hard. It never gets easier. It's a shock. It stops time. My breath for a moment gasps.....What seems like the worst thing for me is the best. The hardest thing is the thing that my body needs the most. Once I release into the bath I become reborn. I am free. The cold ritual tells my body, mind and soul that I can endure. I can do what's hardest and best. It is a signal reminding me to release into all experiences in life and not resist them......let whatever happens roll over and in and just enjoy the process. Enjoy the pain. Enjoy the emotion. Enjoy the intensity.

Is not resistance just inflammation?

I embrace the neutrality of the cold.

### alyson thiessen — 2016-02-10T18:05:19+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-188688>

So....I have felt like crap for well over a month. Huge Carb indulgence which I thought was me being undisciplined...fatigue.....aches..... Yet, I was doing so much correctly. I couldn't understand what was happening to me until......

My CPAP mask broke....

I didn't realize that this mask had been under performing and possibly had broken a few months earlier. The tip off now is when my best friend who I shared a cabin with on the cruise said she heard me snoring....really??? That should've been my first clue. I ignored it. Now I realize that due to my mask not working I was swimming up stream.

In light of this I forced myself into a 40F bath yesterday for 30 minutes. Now, I have been consistently CTing but not 30 minutes....10-15 minutes 4 times/week. Not yesterday. Full 30.....it is better than a spa. It is the ultimate reset button. I felt reborn last night....

After these revelations I bought oysters, salmon and raw tuna....I consumed it like it was water to a girl in the desert....see, I haven't craved seafood at all and normally that's my main food. I thought it was strange that I wasn't wanting it but chalked it up to it being January. No...my body was craving carbs for a reason. I get it.

So this morning I woke up renewed. Feeling better than I have in many months. I feel alive.

I look forward to resetting as I know this will take a few weeks to reverse.

Reminds me yet again....everything counts. The body knows.

Listen.....listen......listen.

### alyson thiessen — 2016-02-11T17:10:34+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-188770>

I posted on the Quantum FB group about my dentistry issue....and then I also side posted with the QSB's how the right side of my body is fucked...everything wrong is on my right side. Jaw issues, tooth issues, sneezing that initiates from the right side of my brain....chronic crack in my heel on the right....shoulder issue...a hip that won't unlock....and on and on......So....

10 days ago I got this infection in my tooth...pain, swelling...ugh. I managed it through Hydrogen Peroxide, thieves oil and activated charcoal but I couldn't get on top of it. So I went to a dentist....she gave me three options. Extraction. Extraction with implant and root canal. I asked her if she has ozone therapy and she said, "the studies aren't proven"....I then asked for alternatives. She had none. She wrote me a scrip for antibiotics....I decided to fill it to buy me time to figure this out properly. I just felt she gave shitty textbook answers. I googled a dentist in Red Deer that has ozone therapy. I saw him yesterday....

He looked at my X-rays and decoded what I have been asking for for 16 years! I had a root canal in 2000 that never was right. I refused to crown it b/c it never ever felt right. I was told there was nothing they could do, that it was in my head. I was infuriated! The Dentist yesterday said that I have probably had a low level infection in this tooth for years....its my last molar on the RIGHT SIDE.....so.....he said, "lets just take that bad boy out. It's not serving you and you likely won't miss it. If you do, we can do an implant.". He then looked at all the silver fillings I have and made a plan to take them out over time and also looked at a nasty tooth on the left and said, "we can save that and probably no root canal"....the other dentist had no options other than the above three for that tooth. Are these fuckers just doing a sales job on me????? The other dentist pushed the 6K + option.....interesting.

Needless to say I feel relief that this problem will get solved within the month. I would love it out today but he is booked....hoping the universe makes a cancellation on his docket today or tomorrow so I don't have to go on another course of antibiotics....OH....that's another thing.....when the first dentist was writing out the r/x I asked for the best possible antibiotic for this. She said, "oh, everyone just gets penicillin ". Dentist yesterday asked what she gave me...he shook his head...."that won't even blow the dust off this infection Alyson".......FUCK!!!!!!!! This is irritating. I find dentistry very difficult to navigate b/c I know ZERO....it seems like a very veiled industry. (sound familiar???) Needless to say I have the antibiotics ready if needed. I still have a lot of pain in the jaw so the infection is in the bone and although I don't want the antibiotics I can see what this infection is doing to me and I don't want it to get any worse.

The upside is I have finally found a dentist that is good. He is open. His practice no longer uses fluoride. YAY. He is against the silver fillings.....and he isn't a salesman.

So I am curious to see how I feel after this gets cleaned up. I have dragged my sorry ass since that damn cruise in November. Given the previous post I know it was the CPAP but also....I have been dragging this infection with me.

Had I not been a part of this forum and quantum I never would've questioned the first dentist. I never would have gotten the answers I seek. Nice to know 16 years ago I was right....

### alyson thiessen — 2016-02-20T03:36:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-189423>

To Serve. Service. Be a producer.......This has my mind at full attention.

I have had a week of rest. It has been lovely and I embraced it rather than try to "busy" myself. The roars of society want me to "push through".....and I said, "fuck you".....and I have just rested. I have only laboured when it has felt right....I have not stressed and through this 'pause' I have been liberated of thought.

Ruben posted an interesting article on FB today about making money as an entrepreneur. The first point struck me at my core. "Be a producer rather than a consumer".... i.e.: make jobs don't take jobs..... Currently I live in Alberta Canada. An oilfield prosperous place unless oil plummets like it has over the past 18 months. When I look at this issue I see a province that was built on the backs of unskilled men who have been asked to do anything at any hour of the day. See in the oilfield there is no clock...the only ticking is bank accounts either upward or downward. These men have left their families for days, weeks and months in pursuit of their careers and money. The cost? Alberta has a 60% divorce rate and the highest rate of infidelity in North America. The cost in my mind is too fucking high. There is nothing sacred in the world of oil....there is no price too high....no man above taking the price....or, the cost. I think frankly, it's inhumane. So these men are now sitting with few transferable skills .... they wait for jobs. They still yearn for upwards of $50/hour....they pine for 150K/year.....

As I read Rubens article about being a producer today I thought of an idea I have had percolating now for a few months. It's simple....a clean business....labor intensive.... I have stalled even getting it started because I didn't want the headache of managing people. MAJOR FUCKING MINDSHIFT TODAY. ..... I will start this business NOT for me....NOT for extra income but to help provide jobs for the men who are idle who need to put food on their tables. I will be mindful in my approach to management and see them NOT as idiots to carry out my demands but as humans who need to feel human. As men who need to feel useful. Each paycheque a gift...not just to them, but to me. So who the fuck am I to not start a business that could do some good? Who am I to sit around and feel content that "I have mine and that's enough.".......Who am I to not serve?

I will serve. I will give. And that is enough.

### Jack Kruse — 2016-02-20T05:45:30+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-189432>

skin in the game..................

### alyson thiessen — 2016-02-23T04:20:20+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-189603>

Life has slowed WAY down....at first I met it with resistance...now I meet it with grace.

The other morning I sat on the deck in -10C and watched the snow fall. Big flakes gently falling to the earth and then I SAW IT!!!!! They were falling in a pattern....double helix....I felt like I was on mushrooms.......I couldn't stop watching...it was like they were teaching me......lesson not lost.

I have so much more to say.....going to leave it at that.....

### Inger — 2016-02-23T09:33:32+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-189615>

### Jack Kruse — 2016-02-23T20:38:06+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-189667>

Falling snow makes the music of the magnetic field. This is how you can sense magnetic precession in hydrogen atoms. _Nuclear precession_ is a long-term, spontaneous phenomenon, unaccompanied by energy exchange. Static gravitational and magnetic fields create a **_torque_** or "twisting force" on subatomic particles with magnetic moments and they act perpendicular to both the field and the direction of the angular momentum.
Falling snow has a sound because the act of precession makes air move. The resultant circular motion is called **_precession_**. As the earth's magnetic field is "always on", nearly every magnetically receptive nucleus on earth, including hydrogen in every drop of water in the ocean of in the clouds, is at this moment quietly precessing away! It actually makes noise we can hear if our detectors are strong enough. Our ears are not but our machines can pick it up.

### alyson thiessen — 2016-02-24T17:20:16+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-189705>

I went to a trade show this weekend in Edmonton. It was the secret gift show...you know the one where you see everything that is on sale at your local gift store (or whatever)....I have never been before and it was interesting in a way especially the REVERSE sticker shock I got....not to mention how differently I viewed the 'wares' for sale. All I could see in this show was excess and a trap. I wasn't salivating at the stuff I could buy at cost...no...I was saddened that our world gets so excited for buying. Not me!

I wore my darkest blue blockers and set out on the floor....What we thought would take us all day took me ONE HOUR....we found all the right stuff at the right time. What a relief...when I left I said goodbye to my two business partners...their eyes were TOTALLY red and bloodshot. They looked like hell.....I on the other hand looked like a spring day. Eyes were clear...energy stable. Electrons in hand.

One of the exhibitors started talking to me ...she was a dark haired girl from New York. She was wearing a huge down parka and shivering. She told me how cold she was....I ventured a guess...."your body is cooling down to deal with the excessive blue light in here"....she looked at me curiously and then said, "I thought the lights would warm me up?"....Oh...they are warming you baby....cooking you to be exact as is all the nnEMF in the place....Her eyes at the point glossed over ever so engrossed in her freezing cold body and I swear I heard her utter, "crazy canadians"....

I never considered how stores and lighting were draining me until the last 6 months. I now opt to pay slightly more for groceries so that I can get in and out in 15 minutes. I also use my dark blue blockers in every store I have to go into now...I used them at the dentist....Costco etc. I become far less drained since I've adopted a strict practice of this.

I also find I am waking up earlier and earlier which I think is a good sign. The sun is now rising at 7:31 instead of 8:45....sunset is 6:05pm. I take comfort in my circadian rhythms working. So...6:30 I now start to stir. I look forward to early mornings pre 6am grounding and looking to the sun....which leads me to another observation.....

Anything in nature that is so big that it demands your attention can not be ignored. The sun is the biggest brightest thing happening...why do people fear it? It really is a light story.

It's 8:19am and -19C....going outside to gaze and CT a bit....

### alyson thiessen — 2016-02-26T17:38:44+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-189826>

In former posts I talked a lot about what I do everyday....CT, Blue light blocking etc....that has become a way of life now. While it made the winter a very docile one I have come to appreciate the beauty of unframed time. I used to fill time with bars and restaurants......endless conversations about very little....and these conversations would just go on and on ... I would also fill time by diligently going to the office every day for 6-8 hours/day whether I had work to do or not.

What a shift from a year ago......2016 will be my first full 12 months on the optimal journey. I have learned so much and yet, I still know very little....but here is what I do know. My body knows. My mind knows....my heart knows. The sun gazing in the morning and watching nature unfold is far more important to me than my phone or computer. This ritual is meditative...it is still....unframed.....

As the UV increases here in the north I have never been so excited about summer before. The rituals that I have now will shift...how? Well every night at about 530pm right now (this time of course changes ) I have the 'lighting of the candles' ritual. I walk around my home and light about 20 candles, turn on the fireplace and fall into a red light stupor of beauty. I can do this because the housework and meal making is always done prior to sunset and yes, that meant in deep winter I was home by 3pm at the latest to get things done because "I was burning daylight". Once daylight savings hits us in a couple weeks I will be able to increase my days...however, I am not filling those hours with busy. This has been such a huge shift for me in the past few months....busy is dead for me. My nights are filled with regenerative time and space .... my days are also filled this way. I refuse to rush around.....refuse to 'errand' my self to death. I am living unframed.
Back to rituals....

Spring is around the corner.....and the ritual will be still home by 3pm ... suntan outside for a couple hours....make supper and clean and then head to the lake for a walk and hopefully a swim by May. In the summer I will go to the lake at 3pm and sun and CT for a couple hours...home for a couple hours ....then back to the lake to CT some more. This is how I plan to spend end of May-September....up to 6 hours/day on the beach. Add to that getting up probably around 6am and heading directly to the lake to swim and sun gaze....

Sometimes I feel so indulgent because my rituals are so gratifying....I know this is blue light thinking. I KNOW....breaking away from that thinking takes discipline in thought. The less blue light I have the less of societies bullshit I want. Unframed.

So even though my rituals appear to 'frame' my life it is actually the unframing that is creating the rituals. The dismantling of half truths......the expansion of unframed thinking. Seeing nature as the reflection it is...rather than a rogue to be destroyed and controlled.

### alyson thiessen — 2016-03-17T18:13:58+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-191079>

The bad boy tooth is gone....FINALLY. Dentist said it was years and maybe decades of infection...here is the cool part.

A few days prior to the extraction I started talking to my body and letting it know what would happen. I told the tooth..."it's time to let go".... the tooth was my last molar on the bottom, right side. The dentist had forewarned me that he would break it first as it is almost impossible to remove in one piece with that big a filling and that much infection. So....

I sat down in the chair with my blue blockers on..... BP taken...111/70 (fuck ya).....got my needles.....and within 10 minutes he starts tugging. I closed my eyes and breathed slowly and steadily....I then told the tooth to 'release'....and boom...it just all came out. The dentist looks at me amazed and said, "that never happens".....He cleaned me up and I was up and out in 40 minutes flat. The healing has been easy. And...my right side actually feels like it is draining!!! My ear and jaw feel relaxed....Not that I am touting extraction however....chronic long term inflammation sucks and this could be a major event for me and my body....

I got to take the tooth home.....can't even see two of the roots from all the infection...I know...GROSS.

PS: I had a dream last week that all my hair was cut off and it was it was brown (uncoloured) .....I don't look good in the butchy lesbian look....

### alyson thiessen — 2016-04-07T18:29:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-192227>

Now that I have UV of 3 almost every day I feel life returning back to my body. I have been thinking a lot about the sun....when I was a kid I would always get hives when I was in the sun as well as a red rash. It led me to avoid the sun....like I never went out b/c of this effect. When I would be outside I would be slathered in sunscreen. I was also allergic to this. LOL. Needless to say the sun wasn't my friend...until NOW.

Now I lay out for 3-4 hours per day with zero negative effects. I always have a nice glow and I never burn. It also feels SO good.
I have never spent so much time outside. YAY

Also, my birthday is Saturday. April 9th...and I will have my first swim in the lake on that day. There is 20 feet of open water on the shore....I will be in twice. I am guessing the temp is about 36F. I will measure this week. Can't wait.

Also...I changed my mattress on my bed. I had a fairly thick mattress and was wondering if this dulled the effect of the magnetico. I put a mattress on that is 5 inches less thick and holy crap! I feel that magnetico now!

Also....fucking antibiotics. I gained 10lbs and wasn't sure why.....nothing changed for me except I had two rounds of stiff antibiotics b/c of my tooth. I read an article that said antibiotics really mess with mitochondria functioning...so I kind of feel like I went back about 6 mnths in my journey however....I had to take them...the infection went into my jaw. So....I do know the cure. More sun. More grounding. More CT....

Not the best written update here by me...sorry. Just wanted to get this out.

### Inger — 2016-04-07T18:56:51+0300

Alyson.... last fall after have huge stress... and drinking too much coffee with pasteurized cream for long and other stuff...... I had an infection in my tooth root last fall.... I got a real boil! ugh. I did not have opportunity to go to the doc... so I just got super strict and avoided all dairy, even butter, ate super clean only the best food and mainly raw... like raw herring and fish heads and raw heart, raw grassfed beef fat and stuff. I could not even eat nuts, not even organic raw macadamias, without it getting worse. And after a week of getting better and better it totally healed! No issues after that! Way later I have even cheated a bit with cheese and cooked stuff and it did not come back! Yay! A infection like that goes away for me when I go real hard core. At least I do everything in my power before I take them... so have not done it for many many years. I do know how far to go and no further.. and my body seems to get unreal healing powers when I do everything optimal!

### alyson thiessen — 2016-04-12T16:55:29+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/alyson-at-2800-feet.14602/post-192555>

It is spring here in Alberta and probably for most of you as well. The trees are considering letting their buds out and the sun is getting stronger and stronger. UV of 3 most days here....super exciting.

I did my first CT in the lake on Saturday which also was my birthday. At 48 I wanted to make a statement. I spent the day reflecting on the past year. I came across Jack and Quantum just over a year ago and started the protocols in May 2015. When I reflect back I am so glad I have come so far. Yes...some days are better than others....yes...some months are better than others....lately though I have gotten back to BAB....MORE water and of course, Lake CT....I feel better. I am convinced that all disease comes from lack of the three legged stool. I think this also can include all psych. disorders.

I am still longing to live somewhere even more remote. My location and environment i.e.: postal code is not optimal. I can feel it. My biggest indicator is my anxiety. I can't seem to get on top of it. And from my experience anxiety generally creates more anxiety. The general sense of well being can be fleeting for me. I am a bit of a storm.

The other longing in me is just to live. Simply. Heavy motivation is quite lost on me at this time. I love my work and spend about 40 hours/week doing it. I love my routine...and I loathe being 'busy'....busy work, errands, running around....grind me down. I minimize it for sure.

I haven't even wanted to write lately. Even writing this blog post is taking an effort. Lackluster? Depressed? Maybe? Or maybe just the bud is still not blooming yet. The winter took a lot out of me....lack of UV, lack of lake CT, 2 rounds of anti biotics. Oh and lack of dollars. I hate being broke. It really grinds me down. This recession in Alberta is deep and long. It effects EVERYONE....and there is little I can do but wait it out. The collective anxiety must be playing a role here.

OHHHH and I had a thought the other day....about the butterfly effect. If this effect is true then.....if there are physical changes in one person on a biochemical level or perhaps quantum level....then wouldn't that effect everyone? I was thinking in relation to my fiancee. If I shift does it effect him. I know it can...but what if it always does. Then .... and my mind is thinking and I am not a scientist so hard to continue on that level....

It's a beautiful day here and I better probably fix the three things that are causing me extreme anxiety.
